ObserveOps
Dashboard module
component viewer
Categories
buttonsfieldsitemstileswidgetsplanes
Dashboard Module · Self-contained
Component Viewer

All 82 isolated, reusable dashboard components in one portable file — every partial's scoped CSS, markup and behaviour inlined. Search to filter; click </> on any card to view its markup.

No components match your search.

buttons18

Add-as-Widget Button buttons/add-as-widget
defaultwith-target-label

Small purple chip shown under an AI Copilot chat answer that pins the suggested visualization to the dashboard as a widget. Tinted purple at rest, solid purple on hover.

used in: ai-copilot-chat · ai-explorer-drawer
<!-- variant: default -->
<button type="button" class="oo-add-as-widget" aria-label="Add as widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  Add as widget
</button>

<!-- variant: with-target-label (descriptive label naming the suggestion being pinned) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-add-as-widget" aria-label="Add “Error rate by host” to the dashboard as a widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  Add as widget
</button>

<!-- state: disabled (suggestion already added) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-add-as-widget is-disabled" disabled aria-label="Widget already added to dashboard">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  Add as widget
</button>
Add Widget Button buttons/add-widget-btn
default

Circular + chip in the dashboard list-panel header. A quiet card-colored trigger that fills teal and spins the glyph 90° on hover; opens the Add Widget flow.

used in: dashboard-panel-head · add-widget-flow
<!-- variant: default -->
<button class="oo-add-widget-btn" type="button" aria-label="Add new widget" title="Add new widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button class="oo-add-widget-btn" type="button" aria-label="Add new widget" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
  </svg>
</button>
Add-Widget Underline Tab buttons/add-widget-tab
defaultwith-disabled

Underline tab group for the Add New Widget panel header (Create Widget / Predefined / User Define). The selected tab carries a teal label and underline; interactive via document-level delegation with roving-tabindex keyboard nav.

used in: add-widget-panel
<!-- variant: default — first tab selected -->
<div class="oo-aw-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Add widget source">
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab on" role="tab" data-tab="create" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Create Widget</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="predefined" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">Predefined</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="userdefine" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">User Define</button>
</div>

<!-- state: middle tab selected -->
<div class="oo-aw-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Add widget source">
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="create" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">Create Widget</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab on" role="tab" data-tab="predefined" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Predefined</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="userdefine" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">User Define</button>
</div>

<!-- variant: with-disabled — last tab disabled -->
<div class="oo-aw-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Add widget source">
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab on" role="tab" data-tab="create" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Create Widget</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="predefined" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">Predefined</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="userdefine" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1" disabled aria-disabled="true">User Define</button>
</div>
AI Generate Button buttons/ai-generate-btn
defaulticon-onlyblock

Gradient teal-to-purple "Generate" action button with a sparkle (SPARK) glyph, used in the Create-with-AI prompt row to turn a plain-English description into a widget. Supports icon-only and full-width variants plus busy and disabled states.

used in: create-widget-modal · add-widget-panel · create-with-ai
<!-- variant: default — sparkle (SPARK) glyph + "Generate" label -->
<button type="button" class="oo-ai-gen-btn">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" />
    <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z" />
  </svg>
  <span>Generate</span>
</button>

<!-- variant: icon-only — square trigger, accessible name on the button -->
<button type="button" class="oo-ai-gen-btn icon-only" aria-label="Generate widget with AI">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" />
    <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z" />
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- state: busy — generating; sparkle pulses, non-interactive -->
<button type="button" class="oo-ai-gen-btn" aria-busy="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" />
    <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z" />
  </svg>
  <span>Generating&hellip;</span>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled — no prompt entered yet -->
<button type="button" class="oo-ai-gen-btn" disabled aria-disabled="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" />
    <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z" />
  </svg>
  <span>Generate</span>
</button>
Ghost Button buttons/button-ghost
ghostwith-iconblock

Secondary transparent, bordered button for low-emphasis actions (Cancel, Reset). Border brightens on hover.

used in: create-widget-modal · modal-footer
<!-- variant: ghost -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-ghost">Cancel</button>

<!-- variant: with-icon (Reset) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-ghost" aria-label="Reset widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M3 12a9 9 0 1 0 3-6.7L3 8" />
    <path d="M3 3v5h5" />
  </svg>
  Reset
</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-ghost" disabled>Cancel</button>

<!-- variant: block (full-width) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-ghost is-block">Discard changes</button>
Outline Button buttons/button-outline
defaultwith-iconblock

Tertiary teal-outline button with no fill, for secondary confirmations (e.g. Create Widget) that sit beside a solid primary action.

used in: create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: default -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-outline">Create Widget</button>

<!-- variant: with-icon -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-outline">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
    <line x1="12" y1="5" x2="12" y2="19"></line>
    <line x1="5" y1="12" x2="19" y2="12"></line>
  </svg>
  Add Widget
</button>

<!-- variant: block -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-outline block">Create Widget</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn-outline" disabled aria-disabled="true">Create Widget</button>
Primary Button buttons/button-primary
solidwith-iconsmmd

Solid teal call-to-action for primary actions (Create, Save). Renders solid teal by default; supports an optional leading/trailing icon, sm/md sizes, and a disabled state.

used in: create-widget-modal · add-widget-panel
<!-- variant: solid (default, md) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn solid">Create &amp; Add Widget</button>

<!-- variant: with-icon -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn solid" aria-label="Create widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
  </svg>
  <span>Create Widget</span>
</button>

<!-- variant: sm -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn solid sm">Save</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-btn solid" disabled aria-disabled="true">Create &amp; Add Widget</button>
Dashboard Tab Switch buttons/dashboard-tab
two-upwith-icons

Segmented tab control in the dashboard list-panel header that switches the main view (Dashboard / NOC View). The selected segment fills teal; single-select via click or arrow keys.

used in: dashboard-panel-header · noc-view
<!-- variant: two-up (Dashboard selected) — the canonical panel-header control -->
<div class="oo-dashboard-tab" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard view">
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt is-active" role="tab" data-tab="dashboard" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Dashboard</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt" role="tab" data-tab="noc" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">NOC View</button>
</div>

<!-- state: noc-active (NOC View selected) -->
<div class="oo-dashboard-tab" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard view">
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt" role="tab" data-tab="dashboard" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">Dashboard</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt is-active" role="tab" data-tab="noc" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">NOC View</button>
</div>

<!-- variant: with-icons -->
<div class="oo-dashboard-tab" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard view">
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt is-active" role="tab" data-tab="dashboard" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="9"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="5"/><rect x="14" y="12" width="7" height="9"/><rect x="3" y="16" width="7" height="5"/></svg>
    Dashboard
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt" role="tab" data-tab="noc" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="2" y="3" width="20" height="14" rx="2"/><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4"/></svg>
    NOC View
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: with-disabled-option (NOC View not yet available) -->
<div class="oo-dashboard-tab" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard view">
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt is-active" role="tab" data-tab="dashboard" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Dashboard</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-tab__opt" role="tab" data-tab="noc" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1" disabled>NOC View</button>
</div>
Floating Action Button buttons/fab
defaultfixedlg

Circular teal floating action button, icon-only, with a teal glow shadow. Pinned bottom-right of the dashboard canvas to trigger the Add Widget flow.

used in: dashboard-canvas · add-widget-flow
<!-- variant: default -->
<button class="oo-fab" type="button" aria-label="Add new widget" title="Add new widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- variant: lg -->
<button class="oo-fab oo-fab--lg" type="button" aria-label="Add new widget" title="Add new widget">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button class="oo-fab" type="button" aria-label="Add new widget" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
  </svg>
</button>
Icon Button buttons/icon-button
ghostbadgedai

Compact 30x30 topbar icon button. Ghost by default, with an optional notification badge and an AI sparkle variant for the Copilot launcher.

used in: dashboard-topbar · ai-copilot-launcher · alerts-tray
<!-- variant: ghost -->
<button type="button" class="oo-icon-button" aria-label="Search">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" /><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3" /></svg>
</button>

<!-- variant: badged -->
<button type="button" class="oo-icon-button" aria-label="Alerts, 99 plus unread">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9" /><path d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0" /></svg>
  <span class="oo-icon-button__badge" aria-hidden="true">99+</span>
</button>

<!-- variant: ai -->
<button type="button" class="oo-icon-button oo-icon-button--ai" aria-label="AI Copilot">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" /><path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z" /></svg>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-icon-button" aria-label="Acknowledge" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" /></svg>
</button>
Insight Action Button buttons/insight-btn
defaultprimaryghost

Small AI insight action buttons (Add as widget / Investigate / Dismiss) with default, primary and ghost variants; purple AI accent.

used in: ai-insights-panel · ai-annotation-popover
<!-- variant: primary (with icon) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  Add as widget
</button>

<!-- variant: default -->
<button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn">Investigate</button>

<!-- variant: ghost (icon-only) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn ghost" aria-label="Dismiss insight">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  Add as widget
</button>
Mini Pill Toggle Group buttons/mini-pill
two-pillmulti-segment

Compact single-select segmented control (e.g. Top / Last) on a card-colored track; the active pill is raised with an inset border. Used for inline sort-order and aggregation choices.

used in: create-widget-modal · create-widget-sorting-pane · dashboard-module
<!-- variant: two-pill — Top / Last sort order, "Top" selected -->
<div class="oo-mini-pill" role="group" aria-label="Sort order">
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="true">Top</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="false">Last</button>
</div>

<!-- variant: multi-segment — three aggregations, "Avg" selected -->
<div class="oo-mini-pill" role="group" aria-label="Aggregation">
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="false">Min</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="true">Avg</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="false">Max</button>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled — whole group non-interactive -->
<div class="oo-mini-pill is-disabled" role="group" aria-label="Sort order (disabled)" aria-disabled="true">
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="true" disabled>Top</button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-mini-pill__btn" aria-pressed="false" disabled>Last</button>
</div>
Time Range Pill buttons/range-pill
today Today
last 24h Last 24 hours
custom 26-06-10 → 26-06-11
defaultstatic

Card-colored chip showing the active time range: a teal .oo-tag badge, an .oo-lbl label, and an optional .oo-clr clear (✕) button. Sits in the dashboard sub-toolbar timeline-range; border brightens to teal on hover/focus.

used in: dashboard-toolbar · timeline-range · create-widget-config
<!-- variant: default (with clear) -->
<div class="oo-range-pill">
  <span class="oo-tag">today</span>
  <span class="oo-lbl">Today</span>
  <button class="oo-clr" type="button" aria-label="Clear time range">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M6 6l12 12M18 6 6 18"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: static (no clear) -->
<div class="oo-range-pill">
  <span class="oo-tag">last 24h</span>
  <span class="oo-lbl">Last 24 hours</span>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<div class="oo-range-pill is-disabled" aria-disabled="true">
  <span class="oo-tag">custom</span>
  <span class="oo-lbl">26-06-10 → 26-06-11</span>
  <button class="oo-clr" type="button" aria-label="Clear time range" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M6 6l12 12M18 6 6 18"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>
Sidebar Icon Button buttons/sidebar-icon
railstandalonewith-spacer

Left nav-rail 32×32 icon button. The active item fills with a teal glow and grows a left accent bar that bleeds into the rail gutter. Single-select within a rail; supports hover, focus and disabled.

used in: dashboard-shell · app-nav-rail
<!-- variant: nav rail (single-select, one item active) -->
<nav class="oo-sidebar-icon-rail" role="navigation" aria-label="Primary">
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon is-active" type="button" aria-current="page" aria-label="Dashboards">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Monitors">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Alerts">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Analytics">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="m7 14 4-4 3 3 5-6"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- spacer pushes trailing items to the bottom of the rail -->
  <span class="oo-sidebar-icon-sp" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Settings">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 1 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 1 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33-1.82 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 1 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82.33H9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 1 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33 1.82V9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z"/></svg>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- variant: state showcase rail (default · active · disabled) -->
<nav class="oo-sidebar-icon-rail" role="navigation" aria-label="States">
  <!-- state: default -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Reports">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6M9 13h6M9 17h6"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- state: active -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon is-active" type="button" aria-current="page" aria-label="Topology">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="5" cy="19" r="2.5"/><circle cx="19" cy="19" r="2.5"/><path d="M12 7.5 6 16.5M12 7.5l6 9"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- state: disabled -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Traces (unavailable)" disabled aria-disabled="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 12h4l3 8 4-16 3 8h4"/></svg>
  </button>
</nav>
Chart Style Chooser buttons/style-chooser
arealinebarhbar

42×34 chart-style preview buttons (Area / Line / Bar / Horizontal bar) rendered as a single-select group; the chosen style gets a teal edge and tint and reflects aria-pressed.

used in: create-widget-modal · dashboard-module
<!-- variant: group — single-select chart-style chooser, Area currently selected -->
<div class="oo-style-chooser" role="group" aria-label="Chart style">
  <!-- state: selected (Area) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-style-chooser__btn is-on" data-style="area" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Area chart">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 14 L6 9 L10 11 L14 5 L18 8 L22 6 L22 16 L2 16 Z" fill="currentColor" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".85"/></svg>
  </button>

  <!-- variant: line -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-style-chooser__btn" data-style="line" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Line chart">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 14 L6 9 L10 11 L14 5 L18 8 L22 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>

  <!-- variant: bar -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-style-chooser__btn" data-style="bar" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Bar chart">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="8" width="3.5" height="8" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="9" y="4" width="3.5" height="12" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="15" y="10" width="3.5" height="6" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
  </button>

  <!-- variant: hbar (horizontal bar) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-style-chooser__btn" data-style="hbar" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Horizontal bar chart">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="3" width="14" height="3" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="9" height="3" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="17" height="3" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled — option unavailable for the current widget type -->
<div class="oo-style-chooser" role="group" aria-label="Chart style (disabled)">
  <button type="button" class="oo-style-chooser__btn" data-style="line" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Line chart" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 14 L6 9 L10 11 L14 5 L18 8 L22 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-style-chooser__btn" data-style="bar" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Bar chart" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="8" width="3.5" height="8" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="9" y="4" width="3.5" height="12" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="15" y="10" width="3.5" height="6" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>
Subbar Action Button buttons/subbar-action
defaultactive

30x30 square icon action button for the dashboard subbar (Fullscreen, Snapshot, More). Muted by default, lifts to a card chip on hover, with a teal pressed/active state.

used in: dashboard-subbar
<!-- variant: default (fullscreen) -->
<button class="oo-subbar-action" type="button" aria-label="Fullscreen">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3M16 3h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3M21 16v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3"/>
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- variant: default (snapshot) -->
<button class="oo-subbar-action" type="button" aria-label="Snapshot">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
    <rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"/>
    <circle cx="9" cy="11" r="2"/>
    <path d="m3 17 5-4 4 3 3-3 6 5"/>
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- state: active (aria-pressed) -->
<button class="oo-subbar-action" type="button" aria-label="Fullscreen" aria-pressed="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3M16 3h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3M21 16v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3"/>
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- variant: more (state: disabled) -->
<button class="oo-subbar-action" type="button" aria-label="More options" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true">
    <circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="19" r="2"/>
  </svg>
</button>
Subbar Panel-Toggle Arrow buttons/subbar-arrow
chevron

30×30 circular icon button in the dashboard subbar that collapses/expands the dashboard-list panel; its chevron rotates 180° in the open state.

used in: dashboard-subbar · dashboard-module
<!-- state: closed — panel hidden, chevron points inward to reveal -->
<button type="button" class="oo-subbar-arrow" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Show dashboard list">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" /></svg>
</button>

<!-- state: open — panel visible, chevron rotated 180° -->
<button type="button" class="oo-subbar-arrow" aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Hide dashboard list">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" /></svg>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-subbar-arrow" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Toggle dashboard list" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" /></svg>
</button>
Widget Type Tab buttons/type-tab
scroll-rowdisabled-option

Horizontally scrollable, single-select tab row for choosing a widget type (Chart, Grid, Gauge, Heat Map, Sankey...). The active tab raises to a card chip with an inset border; the row scrolls when the tabs overflow.

used in: create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: scroll-row (full widget-type selector, Chart active) -->
<div class="oo-type-tab" role="group" aria-label="Widget type">
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="true">Chart</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Grid</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Top N</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Gauge</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Heat Map</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Sankey</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Map</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Stream</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Anomaly</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Forecast</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">AI Insights</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Active Alerts</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Event History</button>
</div>

<!-- variant: disabled-option (Sankey unavailable for this data source) -->
<div class="oo-type-tab" role="group" aria-label="Widget type">
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="true">Chart</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Grid</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Gauge</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false" disabled>Sankey</button>
  <button class="oo-type-tab__tab" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Map</button>
</div>

fields8

AI Chat Input fields/chat-input
emptytyped

AI Copilot message composer: a rounded input row with a trailing teal→purple gradient send button. The wrapper highlights its border on focus; the send button disables when there is nothing to send.

used in: ai-copilot-chat · ask-ai-panel
<!-- variant: empty (placeholder shown, nothing to send → send disabled) -->
<div class="oo-chat-input">
  <input class="oo-chat-input__field" type="text" aria-label="Ask the AI copilot about your infrastructure" placeholder="Ask about your infrastructure…">
  <button type="button" class="oo-chat-input__send is-disabled" disabled aria-label="Send message">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 2 11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4z"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: typed (field holds a message → send enabled) -->
<div class="oo-chat-input">
  <input class="oo-chat-input__field" type="text" aria-label="Ask the AI copilot about your infrastructure" placeholder="Ask about your infrastructure…" value="Why did CPU spike on web-prod-03 at 14:20?">
  <button type="button" class="oo-chat-input__send" aria-label="Send message">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 2 11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4z"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled (composer locked while the AI is generating a response) -->
<div class="oo-chat-input is-disabled" aria-disabled="true">
  <input class="oo-chat-input__field" type="text" aria-label="Ask the AI copilot about your infrastructure" placeholder="Ask about your infrastructure…" disabled>
  <button type="button" class="oo-chat-input__send is-disabled" disabled aria-label="Send message">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 2 11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4z"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>
Checkbox fields/checkbox
box-onlywith-labelindeterminate

15×15 bordered checkbox that fills teal with a check when selected. Built on a visually-hidden native <input type=checkbox> so it is keyboard focusable and toggles without JS. Supports an optional text label and a class-driven indeterminate (select-all) state.

used in: source-picker-table · create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: box-only — unchecked, used inside a table row/select cell -->
<label class="oo-checkbox">
  <input type="checkbox" class="oo-checkbox__input" aria-label="Select row">
  <span class="oo-checkbox__box">
    <svg class="oo-checkbox__check" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M2.5 6.2 5 8.7 9.5 3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
</label>

<!-- variant: with-label — checked -->
<label class="oo-checkbox">
  <input type="checkbox" class="oo-checkbox__input" checked>
  <span class="oo-checkbox__box">
    <svg class="oo-checkbox__check" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M2.5 6.2 5 8.7 9.5 3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-checkbox__label">Include resolved alerts</span>
</label>

<!-- variant: indeterminate — select-all partial state (visual via .is-indeterminate) -->
<label class="oo-checkbox is-indeterminate">
  <input type="checkbox" class="oo-checkbox__input" aria-label="Select all" aria-checked="mixed">
  <span class="oo-checkbox__box">
    <svg class="oo-checkbox__check" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M2.5 6.2 5 8.7 9.5 3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-checkbox__label">Select all monitors</span>
</label>

<!-- state: disabled — checked & non-interactive -->
<label class="oo-checkbox">
  <input type="checkbox" class="oo-checkbox__input" checked disabled>
  <span class="oo-checkbox__box">
    <svg class="oo-checkbox__check" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M2.5 6.2 5 8.7 9.5 3.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-checkbox__label">Locked (required)</span>
</label>
Numeric Input fields/numeric-input
defaultnarrowblock

Small numeric field (60–80px) with a single bottom-border underline. Used inline for line-width, point counts, granularity values and thresholds; supports narrow and full-width variants plus a disabled state.

used in: create-widget-modal · create-widget-config-pane · create-widget-threshold-pane · dashboard-module
<!-- variant: default — 80px underline field (e.g. line width) -->
<input class="oo-num-inp" type="number" value="5" min="0" aria-label="Line width" />

<!-- variant: narrow — 60px, for granularity / point counts -->
<input class="oo-num-inp oo-num-inp--narrow" type="number" value="10" min="1" aria-label="Sample count" />

<!-- variant: block — full-width threshold field with decimal step -->
<input class="oo-num-inp oo-num-inp--block" type="number" value="0.00" step="0.01" aria-label="Threshold value" />

<!-- state: disabled — non-editable, dimmed -->
<input class="oo-num-inp" type="number" value="5" min="0" aria-label="Line width (disabled)" disabled />
Range Slider fields/range-slider
0
2
60
40
defaultwith-iconmid-range

Custom-styled native range input with cross-browser thumb/track, a teal fill that tracks the value, and a small mono value-box. Used in the Create-Widget Style pane for numeric settings like Rotation and Line Width.

used in: create-widget-modal · style-config-pane
<!-- variant: with-icon (Rotation 0–360°, leading glyph) -->
<div class="oo-range-slider">
  <span class="oo-range-slider__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7"/><path d="M21 3v5h-5"/></svg>
  </span>
  <input class="oo-range-slider__input" type="range" min="0" max="360" value="0"
         style="--oo-range-fill:0%" aria-label="Rotation in degrees">
  <span class="oo-range-slider__sv" aria-hidden="true">0</span>
</div>

<!-- variant: default (Line Width 1–8) -->
<div class="oo-range-slider">
  <input class="oo-range-slider__input" type="range" min="1" max="8" value="2"
         style="--oo-range-fill:14%" aria-label="Line width">
  <span class="oo-range-slider__sv" aria-hidden="true">2</span>
</div>

<!-- variant: mid-range (Opacity 0–100) -->
<div class="oo-range-slider">
  <input class="oo-range-slider__input" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="60"
         style="--oo-range-fill:60%" aria-label="Opacity percent">
  <span class="oo-range-slider__sv" aria-hidden="true">60</span>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<div class="oo-range-slider is-disabled">
  <input class="oo-range-slider__input" type="range" min="0" max="100" value="40"
         style="--oo-range-fill:40%" disabled aria-label="Opacity percent (disabled)">
  <span class="oo-range-slider__sv" aria-hidden="true">40</span>
</div>
Search Input fields/search-input
defaultcompactblock

Search field with a leading magnifier glyph, used inside side panels and modals to filter dashboards and widget lists. Ships empty and with-value states.

used in: dashboard-list-panel · add-widget-panel
<!-- variant: default (empty) -->
<div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
  <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search widgets" />
</div>

<!-- variant: with-value (filled) -->
<div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
  <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search widgets" value="cpu usage" />
</div>

<!-- variant: compact (dense side panel) -->
<div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--compact oo-search-input--block">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
  <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search dashboards" />
</div>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block is-disabled">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
  <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search" disabled />
</div>
Select Dropdown fields/select-dropdown
  • Second
  • Minute
  • Hour
  • Day
  • Line
  • Band
  • Point
  • Avg
  • Min
  • Max
  • Sum
  • Count
  • Solid
  • Dashed
  • Dotted
defaultplaceholderopenblock

Select trigger showing the current value with a chevron; clicking it reveals an options listbox. Choosing an option writes it back to the trigger and closes the menu. Ships value, placeholder, open and disabled states.

used in: create-widget-modal · series-config-panel · rollup-config
<!-- variant: default (closed, value selected) -->
<div class="oo-select">
  <button type="button" class="oo-select__trigger" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Rollup interval">
    <span class="oo-select__value">Minute</span>
    <span class="oo-select__chevron" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
  </button>
  <ul class="oo-select__menu" role="listbox" aria-label="Rollup interval">
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Second</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="true">Minute</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Hour</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Day</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<!-- variant: placeholder (closed, nothing chosen) -->
<div class="oo-select">
  <button type="button" class="oo-select__trigger" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Series type">
    <span class="oo-select__value is-placeholder">Select</span>
    <span class="oo-select__chevron" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
  </button>
  <ul class="oo-select__menu" role="listbox" aria-label="Series type">
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Line</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Band</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Point</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<!-- variant: open (menu expanded, one option selected) -->
<div class="oo-select oo-select--block is-open">
  <button type="button" class="oo-select__trigger" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Aggregation">
    <span class="oo-select__value">Avg</span>
    <span class="oo-select__chevron" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
  </button>
  <ul class="oo-select__menu" role="listbox" aria-label="Aggregation">
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="true">Avg</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Min</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Max</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Sum</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Count</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<div class="oo-select is-disabled">
  <button type="button" class="oo-select__trigger" aria-haspopup="listbox" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Line type" disabled>
    <span class="oo-select__value is-placeholder">Select</span>
    <span class="oo-select__chevron" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
  </button>
  <ul class="oo-select__menu" role="listbox" aria-label="Line type">
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Solid</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Dashed</li>
    <li class="oo-select__option" role="option" aria-selected="false">Dotted</li>
  </ul>
</div>
Text Input Field fields/text-input
defaultwith-valuefocusedrequireddisabled

Labelled single-line text field with a muted caption label and a borderless input whose hairline bottom border brightens to teal on focus. Used for Widget Name / Description in the Create Widget flow.

used in: create-widget-modal · widget-config-panel
<!-- variant: default (required, empty placeholder) -->
<div class="oo-text-input">
  <label class="oo-text-input__label" for="oo-ti-name">
    Widget Name<span class="oo-text-input__req" aria-hidden="true">*</span>
  </label>
  <input class="oo-text-input__field" id="oo-ti-name" type="text"
         placeholder="Enter widget name" required aria-required="true" />
</div>

<!-- variant: with-value -->
<div class="oo-text-input">
  <label class="oo-text-input__label" for="oo-ti-desc">Widget Description</label>
  <input class="oo-text-input__field" id="oo-ti-desc" type="text"
         value="CPU utilisation by host" placeholder="Enter description" />
</div>

<!-- state: focused (static demo of the teal underline) -->
<div class="oo-text-input">
  <label class="oo-text-input__label" for="oo-ti-focused">Label</label>
  <input class="oo-text-input__field is-focused" id="oo-ti-focused" type="text"
         value="Typing…" placeholder="Enter value" />
</div>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<div class="oo-text-input is-disabled">
  <label class="oo-text-input__label" for="oo-ti-disabled">Source ID</label>
  <input class="oo-text-input__field" id="oo-ti-disabled" type="text"
         value="auto-generated" placeholder="Enter value" disabled aria-disabled="true" />
</div>
Toggle Switch fields/toggle-switch
offon

34×18 animated slide toggle with an ON/OFF state label. The track fills teal and the white knob slides on, driven entirely off aria-checked. Used across the widget config panels for boolean options like Legend, axis titles, Points and Metric Grid.

used in: create-widget-config · widget-style-panel · dashboard-settings
<!-- variant: off (default) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-toggle" role="switch" aria-checked="false" aria-label="Legend">
  <span class="oo-toggle__track" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-toggle__state" aria-hidden="true">OFF</span>
</button>

<!-- variant: on -->
<button type="button" class="oo-toggle" role="switch" aria-checked="true" aria-label="Show points">
  <span class="oo-toggle__track" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-toggle__state" aria-hidden="true">ON</span>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled (off) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-toggle" role="switch" aria-checked="false" aria-label="Metric grid" disabled>
  <span class="oo-toggle__track" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-toggle__state" aria-hidden="true">OFF</span>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled (on) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-toggle" role="switch" aria-checked="true" aria-label="Use custom sticky timeline" disabled>
  <span class="oo-toggle__track" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-toggle__state" aria-hidden="true">ON</span>
</button>

items12

Disclosure Caret items/caret
glyphtoggle-button

Small chevron glyph that points right when collapsed and rotates 90° to point down when expanded; used in tree-nav rows, accordion headers and disclosure toggles. Open state can be driven by its own modifier or an expanded ancestor.

used in: dashboard-picker-tree · dashboard-module
<!-- variant: glyph · state: closed — decorative caret, points right (collapsed) -->
<span class="oo-caret" aria-hidden="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6" /></svg>
</span>

<!-- variant: glyph · state: open — rotated 90° via .is-open, points down (expanded) -->
<span class="oo-caret is-open" aria-hidden="true">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6" /></svg>
</span>

<!-- variant: toggle-button · state: open — standalone disclosure toggle; aria-expanded drives the rotation -->
<button type="button" class="oo-caret" aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Collapse section">
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6" /></svg>
</button>

<!-- variant: toggle-button · state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-caret" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Expand section" disabled>
  <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6" /></svg>
</button>
Chat Message items/chat-message
Why did checkout latency spike at 14:20?

The spike traces to cart-service — p95 jumped to 1.8s after a deploy at 14:18.

Root cause: a slow query against orders_db. Open the trace.

Forecast next hour error budget.
useraityping

AI Copilot chat bubbles. The user voice is a solid teal, right-aligned bubble with a flattened bottom-right tail; the ai voice pairs a sparkle gradient avatar with a left-aligned card bubble holding rich text and an optional 3-dot typing indicator while the answer streams.

used in: ai-copilot-chat · ai-explore-drawer
<!-- Chat bubbles for the AI Copilot conversation. Drop these inside a flex
     column (display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap) acting as role="log".
     The avatar SVG is the ObserveOps "spark" mark, marked decorative. -->

<!-- variant: user -->
<div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--user" tabindex="0" aria-label="You said">
  Why did checkout latency spike at 14:20?
</div>

<!-- variant: ai -->
<div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--ai" tabindex="0" aria-label="Copilot said">
  <div class="oo-chat-message__avatar" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" focusable="false">
      <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z"/>
      <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-chat-message__bubble">
    <p>The spike traces to <b>cart-service</b> — p95 jumped to <b>1.8s</b> after a deploy at 14:18.</p>
    <p>Root cause: a slow query against <b>orders_db</b>. <a href="#">Open the trace</a>.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: ai · state: typing -->
<div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--ai" aria-label="Copilot is typing" aria-live="polite">
  <div class="oo-chat-message__avatar" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" focusable="false">
      <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z"/>
      <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z"/>
    </svg>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-chat-message__bubble">
    <div class="oo-chat-message__typing" role="status" aria-label="Copilot is thinking">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: user · state: sending -->
<div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--user oo-chat-message--sending" aria-label="You said, sending">
  Forecast next hour error budget.
</div>
Count Badge items/count-badge
5 2 8 99+
defaultsmlgtealredgreensolid

Small pill that shows a count, like the folder item-counts on the dashboard tree rows. Quiet muted-on-card2 by default, with teal/red/green tone modifiers and sm/lg sizes (sm matches the 9.5px tree size).

used in: dashboard-tree-nav · dashboard-list-panel
<!-- variant: default (quiet tree-row count, sm) -->
<span class="oo-count-badge oo-count-badge--sm" role="img" aria-label="5 dashboards">5</span>

<!-- variant: teal (highlighted total) -->
<span class="oo-count-badge oo-count-badge--teal" role="img" aria-label="2 new">2</span>

<!-- variant: red (alert count) -->
<span class="oo-count-badge oo-count-badge--red" role="img" aria-label="8 critical">8</span>

<!-- variant: solid (emphasis, overflow count) -->
<span class="oo-count-badge oo-count-badge--solid" role="img" aria-label="99 plus items">99+</span>
Menu Item items/menu-item
defaultwith-iconwith-shortcutdangerseparator

Dropdown / context-menu option row: a leading action glyph + label, with a danger variant for destructive actions and a thin separator. Refined from the dashboard widget '···' overflow menu (Edit / Clone / Full Screen / sep / Delete); supports an optional trailing keyboard-shortcut hint and roving arrow-key focus.

used in: widget-more-menu · widget-header-actions · context-menu
<!-- The widget "···" overflow menu: icon + label rows, a separator, and a danger row. -->
<div class="oo-menu" role="menu" aria-label="Widget actions">

  <!-- variant: with-icon (default action row) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7M18.5 2.5a2.1 2.1 0 0 1 3 3L12 16l-4 1 1-4z"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Edit</span>
  </button>

  <!-- state: active (highlighted / pointer or roving focus target) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item is-active" role="menuitem" aria-current="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 9h11v11H9zM5 15H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h10a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v1"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Clone</span>
  </button>

  <!-- variant: with-shortcut (trailing key hint) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3M16 3h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3M21 16v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Full Screen</span>
    <kbd class="oo-menu__shortcut">F</kbd>
  </button>

  <!-- state: disabled (non-applicable action) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem" disabled aria-disabled="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3v12M8 11l4 4 4-4M4 17v2a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-2"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Export CSV</span>
  </button>

  <!-- variant: separator -->
  <div class="oo-menu__sep" role="separator"></div>

  <!-- variant: danger (destructive action) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item oo-menu__item--danger" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Delete</span>
  </button>

</div>
Severity Badge items/severity-badge
Critical Warning Info Clear Critical
critwarninfookdot

Inline uppercase severity label with four colour variants (crit/warn/info/ok) on tinted backgrounds. Used in Alerts and Events data-grid rows to flag row severity; supports an optional leading status dot and an interactive filter form.

used in: alerts-widget · events-widget · dashboard-grid-table
<!-- variant: crit -->
<span class="oo-sev oo-sev--crit" aria-label="Severity: Critical">Critical</span>

<!-- variant: warn -->
<span class="oo-sev oo-sev--warn" aria-label="Severity: Warning">Warning</span>

<!-- variant: info -->
<span class="oo-sev oo-sev--info" aria-label="Severity: Info">Info</span>

<!-- variant: ok -->
<span class="oo-sev oo-sev--ok" aria-label="Severity: Clear">Clear</span>

<!-- variant: dot (leading status dot inherits the variant colour) -->
<span class="oo-sev oo-sev--crit oo-sev--dot" aria-label="Severity: Critical">Critical</span>

<!-- variant: interactive filter · state: pressed -->
<button type="button" class="oo-sev oo-sev--warn" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Filter alerts by Warning severity">Warning</button>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<button type="button" class="oo-sev oo-sev--info is-disabled" disabled aria-label="Filter alerts by Info severity">Info</button>
Status Dot items/status-dot
Operational Critical Degraded Disabled
okcritwarninfomutedwith-labeldot-onlyglow

8×8 colored circle indicating health/status, inline before an optional label. Variants ok (green), crit (red), warn (yellow), info (blue) and muted; optional glow ring or live pulse, plus a dimmed disabled state.

used in: monitor-table-widget · source-picker-modal · create-widget-flow
<!-- variant: ok (green) with label -->
<span class="oo-status-dot oo-status-dot--ok">
  <span class="oo-status-dot__glyph" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-status-dot__label">Operational</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: crit (red) with pulse, live status -->
<span class="oo-status-dot oo-status-dot--crit oo-status-dot--pulse">
  <span class="oo-status-dot__glyph" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-status-dot__label">Critical</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: warn (yellow) with glow ring -->
<span class="oo-status-dot oo-status-dot--warn oo-status-dot--glow">
  <span class="oo-status-dot__glyph" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-status-dot__label">Degraded</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: muted, dot-only (label conveyed via aria-label) -->
<span class="oo-status-dot oo-status-dot--muted" role="img" aria-label="No data">
  <span class="oo-status-dot__glyph" aria-hidden="true"></span>
</span>

<!-- state: disabled / inactive -->
<span class="oo-status-dot oo-status-dot--ok is-disabled" aria-disabled="true">
  <span class="oo-status-dot__glyph" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-status-dot__label">Disabled</span>
</span>
AI Suggestion Chip items/suggestion-chip
defaultwith-iconactiverow

Clickable AI suggestion pill (11px) that takes a purple border and purple text on hover; tapping it fires a prompt. Lay a few side by side with the row wrapper as quick-ask prompts in the AI Copilot.

used in: ai-copilot-drawer · ask-ai-panel
<!-- A few suggestion chips laid out in a row -->
<div class="oo-suggestion-chip-row">
  <!-- variant: default -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip">Summarize dashboard health</button>

  <!-- variant: with-icon -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip" aria-label="Forecast core-router-01 CPU">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M12 3l1.9 4.6L18.5 9l-4.6 1.9L12 15.5 10.1 10.9 5.5 9l4.6-1.4L12 3z" />
    </svg>
    Forecast core-router-01 CPU
  </button>

  <!-- variant: active (featured suggestion) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip is-active">Why is DATASTORE-01 disk high?</button>

  <!-- state: disabled -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip" disabled>Top 5 hosts by latency</button>
</div>
Data Table Row items/table-row
Monitor Traffic Interface Status
fg_firewall.mindarray 23.4 Kbps l2t.root-36 Up
cisco_core.local 11.2 Kbps To_PaloAlto-38 Up
ipv6R6.test.com 4.8 Kbps ssl.root-16 Down
Severity Alert Source Time
Critical CPU saturation > 90% 172.16.4.118 12m ago
Warning Disk usage breach 172.16.9.42 27m ago
Info Interface flapping 172.16.2.201 5m ago
Clear Service down 172.16.14.88 41m ago
Monitor Traffic Status
mpls1.mpls1.com 38.1 Kbps Up
PA-3020x 17.6 Kbps Up
zimbra-server — Down
monitoralert-logclickablescroll

Hairline-ruled status/monitor data table with an uppercase sticky header and a soft hover fill that sweeps the whole row. Cells carry inline status dots, Up/Down labels and severity badges; an optional clickable variant adds keyboard single-selection.

used in: dashboard-grid-widget · dashboard-alerts-widget · dashboard-canvas
<!-- variant: monitor — status dot + inline Up/Down label -->
<table class="oo-table-row" aria-label="Monitor status">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th scope="col">Monitor</th>
      <th scope="col">Traffic</th>
      <th scope="col">Interface</th>
      <th scope="col">Status</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__dot oo-table-row__dot--up" aria-hidden="true"></span>fg_firewall.mindarray</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">23.4 Kbps</td>
      <td>l2t.root-36</td>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__status">Up</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__dot oo-table-row__dot--up" aria-hidden="true"></span>cisco_core.local</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">11.2 Kbps</td>
      <td>To_PaloAlto-38</td>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__status">Up</span></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__dot oo-table-row__dot--down" aria-hidden="true"></span>ipv6R6.test.com</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">4.8 Kbps</td>
      <td>ssl.root-16</td>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__status oo-table-row__status--down">Down</span></td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<!-- variant: alert-log — severity badge + mono timestamp -->
<table class="oo-table-row" aria-label="Recent alerts">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th scope="col">Severity</th>
      <th scope="col">Alert</th>
      <th scope="col">Source</th>
      <th scope="col">Time</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__sev oo-table-row__sev--crit">Critical</span></td>
      <td>CPU saturation &gt; 90%</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.4.118</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">12m ago</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__sev oo-table-row__sev--warn">Warning</span></td>
      <td>Disk usage breach</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.9.42</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">27m ago</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__sev oo-table-row__sev--info">Info</span></td>
      <td>Interface flapping</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.2.201</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">5m ago</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td><span class="oo-table-row__sev oo-table-row__sev--ok">Clear</span></td>
      <td>Service down</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.14.88</td>
      <td class="oo-table-row__num">41m ago</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

<!-- variant: clickable — selectable rows in a sticky-header scroll wrapper; states: selected, disabled -->
<div class="oo-table-row-scroll" style="max-height:150px">
  <table class="oo-table-row" aria-label="Select a monitor">
    <thead>
      <tr>
        <th scope="col">Monitor</th>
        <th scope="col">Traffic</th>
        <th scope="col">Status</th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <!-- state: selected -->
      <tr class="oo-table-row__row oo-table-row__row--clickable" tabindex="0" aria-selected="true" aria-label="mpls1.mpls1.com, up">
        <td><span class="oo-table-row__dot oo-table-row__dot--up" aria-hidden="true"></span>mpls1.mpls1.com</td>
        <td class="oo-table-row__num">38.1 Kbps</td>
        <td><span class="oo-table-row__status">Up</span></td>
      </tr>
      <tr class="oo-table-row__row oo-table-row__row--clickable" tabindex="0" aria-selected="false" aria-label="PA-3020x, warning">
        <td><span class="oo-table-row__dot oo-table-row__dot--warn" aria-hidden="true"></span>PA-3020x</td>
        <td class="oo-table-row__num">17.6 Kbps</td>
        <td><span class="oo-table-row__status">Up</span></td>
      </tr>
      <!-- state: disabled -->
      <tr class="oo-table-row__row oo-table-row__row--clickable is-disabled" aria-disabled="true" aria-selected="false" aria-label="zimbra-server, unreachable (disabled)">
        <td><span class="oo-table-row__dot oo-table-row__dot--down" aria-hidden="true"></span>zimbra-server</td>
        <td class="oo-table-row__num">—</td>
        <td><span class="oo-table-row__status oo-table-row__status--down">Down</span></td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</div>
Ticker Item items/ticker-item
DATASTORE-01 Disk Usage 80.9% > 80 app-cluster Response time 1240ms core-router-01 CPU Load 94% sustained mq-broker Queue depth 14.2k exceeds limit (acknowledged)
criticalwarnlink

A single scrolling alert in the NOC 'Critical' ticker strip: a bold severity-coloured source/host name plus its alert message, with a leading status dot. Reads red by default (critical) and orange in the warn variant; an optional anchor/button form lets the item drill into the underlying alert. Marquee motion lives on the parent track.

used in: noc-view · noc-ticker
<!-- variant: critical — default red source + alert message -->
<span class="oo-ticker-item">
  <b class="oo-ticker-item__src">DATASTORE-01</b>
  <span class="oo-ticker-item__msg">Disk Usage 80.9% &gt; 80</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: warn — orange source for a warning-severity alert -->
<span class="oo-ticker-item oo-ticker-item--warn">
  <b class="oo-ticker-item__src">app-cluster</b>
  <span class="oo-ticker-item__msg">Response time 1240ms</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: link — rendered as an anchor that drills into the alert (hover/focus) -->
<a class="oo-ticker-item" href="#" aria-label="core-router-01: CPU Load 94% sustained — open alert">
  <b class="oo-ticker-item__src">core-router-01</b>
  <span class="oo-ticker-item__msg">CPU Load 94% sustained</span>
</a>

<!-- state: disabled — acknowledged alert dims out, no interaction -->
<span class="oo-ticker-item is-disabled" aria-disabled="true">
  <b class="oo-ticker-item__src">mq-broker</b>
  <span class="oo-ticker-item__msg">Queue depth 14.2k exceeds limit (acknowledged)</span>
</span>
Tree Leaf Row items/tree-leaf
Service Health
Alert Summary
Capacity Planning
Restricted Dashboard
defaultactivefavourited

Tree child row in the dashboard picker: a lock glyph, an ellipsised label and a trailing star favourite toggle. The active leaf gets a teal-glow highlight; the star turns gold when favourited. Clicking a leaf single-selects it within its tree; the star toggles favourite via event delegation.

used in: dashboard-picker-panel · dashboard-tree-nav
<!-- A dashboard picker tree group; leaf single-select scopes to this container -->
<div class="oo-tree-leaf-group" role="tree" aria-label="Dashboards">

  <!-- variant: default -->
  <div class="oo-tree-leaf" role="treeitem" tabindex="0" aria-selected="false">
    <svg class="oo-tree-leaf__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-tree-leaf__label">Service Health</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-leaf__star" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Add Service Health to favourites">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- variant: active (selected leaf, teal glow) -->
  <div class="oo-tree-leaf is-active" role="treeitem" tabindex="0" aria-selected="true">
    <svg class="oo-tree-leaf__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-tree-leaf__label">Alert Summary</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-leaf__star" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Add Alert Summary to favourites">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- variant: favourited (star toggled on, gold) -->
  <div class="oo-tree-leaf" role="treeitem" tabindex="0" aria-selected="false">
    <svg class="oo-tree-leaf__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-tree-leaf__label">Capacity Planning</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-leaf__star is-fav" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Remove Capacity Planning from favourites">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- state: disabled (leaf the user cannot open) -->
  <div class="oo-tree-leaf is-disabled" role="treeitem" tabindex="-1" aria-disabled="true" aria-selected="false">
    <svg class="oo-tree-leaf__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-tree-leaf__label">Restricted Dashboard</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-leaf__star" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Add Restricted Dashboard to favourites" disabled>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

</div>
Dashboard Tree Node items/tree-node
collapsedexpandedwith-children

Collapsible dashboard-tree category row: a caret that rotates 90deg when open, a flexible label, and a trailing count badge. Clicking the row toggles it open to reveal a children container of dashboard leaves.

used in: dashboard-list-panel · dashboard-tree
<!-- variant: collapsed — category row with caret + label + count, children hidden -->
<div class="oo-tree-node">
  <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__row" aria-expanded="false">
    <span class="oo-tree-node__caret" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__label">Network</span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__count">10</span>
  </button>
  <div class="oo-tree-node__children" role="group"></div>
</div>

<!-- variant: expanded (with-children) — node is open, children revealed -->
<div class="oo-tree-node is-open">
  <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__row" aria-expanded="true">
    <span class="oo-tree-node__caret" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__label">My Favorite</span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__count">7</span>
  </button>
  <div class="oo-tree-node__children" role="group">
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__child is-active" aria-current="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
      <span>Alert Summary</span>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__child">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
      <span>Release Demo Dashboard</span>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__child">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
      <span>firewall wan link</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: collapsed (no children) — leaf category, caret has nothing to reveal -->
<div class="oo-tree-node">
  <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__row" aria-expanded="false">
    <span class="oo-tree-node__caret" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__label">Applications</span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__count">5</span>
  </button>
  <div class="oo-tree-node__children" role="group"></div>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled — category present but not selectable -->
<div class="oo-tree-node is-disabled">
  <button type="button" class="oo-tree-node__row" aria-expanded="false" disabled>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__caret" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__label">Virtualization</span>
    <span class="oo-tree-node__count">6</span>
  </button>
  <div class="oo-tree-node__children" role="group"></div>
</div>
Trend Chip items/trend-chip
2.4% 1.2% 0.0% Up Down —
updownneutralbare

Inline trend / status chip: a directional triangle glyph plus a value, tinted green for an up trend and red for a down trend (neutral = flat). Refined from the dashboard grid widget's bare green/red .chip-up / .chip-dn Status text, with a tinted-pill default and a `--bare` text-only variant.

used in: grid-widget-status · kpi-delta
<!-- variant: up — green up-triangle with a positive value -->
<span class="oo-trend-chip oo-trend-chip--up" role="img" aria-label="Trending up 2.4 percent">
  <svg class="oo-trend-chip__icon" viewBox="0 0 10 10" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 2 9 8H1Z"/></svg>
  <span class="oo-trend-chip__val">2.4%</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: down — red down-triangle with a negative value -->
<span class="oo-trend-chip oo-trend-chip--down" role="img" aria-label="Trending down 1.2 percent">
  <svg class="oo-trend-chip__icon" viewBox="0 0 10 10" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 8 1 2h8Z"/></svg>
  <span class="oo-trend-chip__val">1.2%</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: neutral — flat / no change -->
<span class="oo-trend-chip oo-trend-chip--neutral" role="img" aria-label="No change">
  <svg class="oo-trend-chip__icon" viewBox="0 0 10 10" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="1" y="4" width="8" height="2" rx="1"/></svg>
  <span class="oo-trend-chip__val">0.0%</span>
</span>

<!-- variant: bare — text-only status, matching the original grid Status column ("Up" / "Down") -->
<span class="oo-trend-chip oo-trend-chip--up oo-trend-chip--bare" role="img" aria-label="Status up">
  <svg class="oo-trend-chip__icon" viewBox="0 0 10 10" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 2 9 8H1Z"/></svg>
  <span class="oo-trend-chip__val">Up</span>
</span>
<span class="oo-trend-chip oo-trend-chip--down oo-trend-chip--bare" role="img" aria-label="Status down">
  <svg class="oo-trend-chip__icon" viewBox="0 0 10 10" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 8 1 2h8Z"/></svg>
  <span class="oo-trend-chip__val">Down</span>
</span>

<!-- state: disabled — tone collapses to dim, no tint -->
<span class="oo-trend-chip oo-trend-chip--up is-disabled" role="img" aria-label="Trend unavailable" aria-disabled="true">
  <svg class="oo-trend-chip__icon" viewBox="0 0 10 10" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 2 9 8H1Z"/></svg>
  <span class="oo-trend-chip__val">—</span>
</span>

tiles8

Empty State tiles/empty-state

All clear

No active AI insights for this dashboard.

No user-defined widgets yet

Create a widget and save it to reuse it here.

No results found

Try a different search term or clear the active filters.

defaultpositivewith-actioncompact

Centered empty / placeholder state for the AI insights drawer and empty panels: a large faint icon over an "All clear"-style heading and a muted hint line, with an optional inline CTA button. Positive-tone and compact-size modifiers included.

used in: ai-insights-drawer · user-defined-widgets-gallery · add-widget-panel · empty-panel
<!-- variant: positive — "All clear" (AI insights drawer) -->
<div class="oo-empty-state is-positive" role="status">
  <span class="oo-empty-state__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5">
      <path d="M12 3l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" />
    </svg>
  </span>
  <p class="oo-empty-state__title">All clear</p>
  <p class="oo-empty-state__hint">No active AI insights for this dashboard.</p>
</div>

<!-- variant: with-action — user-defined widgets gallery -->
<div class="oo-empty-state" role="status">
  <span class="oo-empty-state__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6">
      <rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2" />
      <path d="M3 10h18M9 4v16" />
    </svg>
  </span>
  <p class="oo-empty-state__title">No user-defined widgets yet</p>
  <p class="oo-empty-state__hint">Create a widget and save it to reuse it here.</p>
  <button type="button" class="oo-empty-state__action">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14" />
    </svg>
    Create a widget
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: compact · state: disabled action -->
<div class="oo-empty-state is-compact" role="status">
  <span class="oo-empty-state__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6">
      <circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" />
      <path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3" />
    </svg>
  </span>
  <p class="oo-empty-state__title">No results found</p>
  <p class="oo-empty-state__hint">Try a different search term or clear the active filters.</p>
  <button type="button" class="oo-empty-state__action" disabled aria-disabled="true">Reset filters</button>
</div>
AI Insight Card tiles/insight-card
Anomaly Confidence 94%
Disk usage anomaly on DATASTORE-01
Current-partition usage is 80.9% — 3.1σ above the 14-day learned baseline. Sustained climb began ~46m ago.
Forecast Confidence 82%
sql-primary will breach session limit
Active sessions are projected to cross 350 in ~3h 10m at the current rate. Consider scaling the connection pool.
Correlation Confidence 90%
core-router-01 & mq-broker move together
CPU on core-router-01 and queue depth on mq-broker show 0.86 correlation over 24h — likely a shared traffic driver.
defaultcritwarnokinfo

AI insight tile surfaced in the Copilot drawer's AI Insights tab: a severity-keyed left rail, an uppercase kind tag with a right-aligned confidence%, a title, a description, a sample sparkline (inline SVG that inherits the severity colour), and an action row composing the insight-btn classes (Add as widget / Investigate / Dismiss). The Dismiss button fades and removes its own card.

used in: ai-insights-panel · ai-copilot-drawer
<!-- variant: crit -->
<article class="oo-insight-card oo-insight-card--crit" aria-label="Critical AI insight">
  <div class="oo-insight-card__top">
    <span class="oo-insight-card__kind">Anomaly</span>
    <span class="oo-insight-card__conf">Confidence <b>94%</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__title">Disk usage anomaly on DATASTORE-01</div>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__desc">Current-partition usage is <b>80.9%</b> — 3.1&sigma; above the 14-day learned baseline. Sustained climb began ~46m ago.</div>
  <svg class="oo-insight-card__spark" viewBox="0 0 320 30" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M0 23 L29 21 L58 24 L87 19 L116 21 L145 16 L174 18 L203 12 L232 14 L261 7 L290 4 L320 2 L320 30 L0 30 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".13"/>
    <path d="M0 23 L29 21 L58 24 L87 19 L116 21 L145 16 L174 18 L203 12 L232 14 L261 7 L290 4 L320 2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__acts">
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
      Add as widget
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn">Investigate</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn ghost" data-oo-dismiss aria-label="Dismiss insight">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</article>

<!-- variant: warn -->
<article class="oo-insight-card oo-insight-card--warn" aria-label="Warning AI insight">
  <div class="oo-insight-card__top">
    <span class="oo-insight-card__kind">Forecast</span>
    <span class="oo-insight-card__conf">Confidence <b>82%</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__title">sql-primary will breach session limit</div>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__desc">Active sessions are projected to cross <b>350</b> in ~<b>3h 10m</b> at the current rate. Consider scaling the connection pool.</div>
  <svg class="oo-insight-card__spark" viewBox="0 0 320 30" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M0 25 L29 22 L58 23 L87 20 L116 21 L145 17 L174 18 L203 14 L232 15 L261 11 L290 9 L320 6 L320 30 L0 30 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".13"/>
    <path d="M0 25 L29 22 L58 23 L87 20 L116 21 L145 17 L174 18 L203 14 L232 15 L261 11 L290 9 L320 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__acts">
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
      Add as widget
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn">Investigate</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn ghost" data-oo-dismiss aria-label="Dismiss insight">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</article>

<!-- variant: info -->
<article class="oo-insight-card oo-insight-card--info" aria-label="Informational AI insight">
  <div class="oo-insight-card__top">
    <span class="oo-insight-card__kind">Correlation</span>
    <span class="oo-insight-card__conf">Confidence <b>90%</b></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__title">core-router-01 &amp; mq-broker move together</div>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__desc">CPU on <b>core-router-01</b> and queue depth on <b>mq-broker</b> show <b>0.86</b> correlation over 24h — likely a shared traffic driver.</div>
  <svg class="oo-insight-card__spark" viewBox="0 0 320 30" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M0 15 L29 17 L58 12 L87 18 L116 13 L145 19 L174 12 L203 16 L232 10 L261 15 L290 11 L320 16 L320 30 L0 30 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".13"/>
    <path d="M0 15 L29 17 L58 12 L87 18 L116 13 L145 19 L174 12 L203 16 L232 10 L261 15 L290 11 L320 16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="oo-insight-card__acts">
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary">
