      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
      Add as widget
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn">Investigate</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn ghost" data-oo-dismiss aria-label="Dismiss insight">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</article>
Library Card tiles/library-card
predefineduser-definegrid

Compact 3-up library card from the Add Widget panel's Predefined and User Define galleries. A teal icon over a widget name and an uppercase type sub-label; clicking it drops that saved widget onto the dashboard. Refined into a real button with hover lift, focus ring, a selected/current state and a disabled treatment. Lay them out via .oo-library-card-grid.

used in: add-widget-panel · predefined-widget-gallery · user-define-widget-gallery
<!-- library-card · 3-up Predefined / User Define gallery cards.
     Each card is an action button: clicking it adds the saved widget. -->
<div class="oo-library-card-grid">

  <!-- variant: predefined (Chart) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-library-card" aria-label="Add CPU Utilization Trend chart widget">
    <span class="oo-library-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 17l5-6 4 3 5-8"/><path d="M3 20h18"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__nm">CPU Utilization Trend</span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__sub">Chart</span>
  </button>

  <!-- variant: user-define (Numeric) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-library-card" aria-label="Add My SLA Summary numeric widget">
    <span class="oo-library-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M7 8v8M5 8h4M15 8h4l-3 4h.5a2 2 0 1 1-2 2"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__nm">My SLA Summary</span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__sub">Numeric</span>
  </button>

  <!-- state: selected (current pick) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-library-card is-selected" aria-current="true" aria-label="Memory Free percent gauge widget, selected">
    <span class="oo-library-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M4 18a8 8 0 1 1 16 0"/><path d="m12 14 4-4"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__nm">Memory Free %</span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__sub">Gauge</span>
  </button>

  <!-- state: disabled (already added / unavailable) -->
  <button type="button" class="oo-library-card" disabled aria-label="Active Alerts widget, already added">
    <span class="oo-library-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 3a6 6 0 0 0-6 6c0 5-2 6-2 6h16s-2-1-2-6a6 6 0 0 0-6-6z"/><path d="M10.5 20a1.8 1.8 0 0 0 3 0"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__nm">Active Alerts</span>
    <span class="oo-library-card__sub">Alerts</span>
  </button>

</div>
Metric Detail Card tiles/metric-detail-card

system.cpu.percent

Lower is better

Description

Percentage of total CPU time in use across all cores, from 0% (idle) to 100% (fully utilised). Used for load monitoring, alerting and capacity planning.

Interpretation

  • High values: above 80% indicates CPU saturation and potential performance issues.

  • Low values: below 5% means the CPU is mostly idle — normal during off-peak windows.

RCA: when high, correlate with related counters, recent config changes and active alerts on the same source.

system.memory.free.percent

Higher is better

Description

Percentage of physical memory currently free and available for allocation.

Interpretation

  • High values: plenty of headroom for new allocations.

  • Low values: can trigger swapping and degraded performance.

RCA: when low, check for memory leaks, oversized caches and recent deploys on the host.

network.service.latency.ms

Lower is better

Description

Round-trip latency to the monitored network service, in milliseconds.

Interpretation

  • High values: suggest congestion or routing issues.

apm.transaction.response.time.ms

Lower is better

Description

Not collected for this data source. Pick a source that exposes APM transaction metrics.

lower-betterhigher-bettercompact

The metric / counter detail card — the right pane of the counter picker. Shows a monospaced metric name with a higher / lower-is-better goal chip, a description block, an interpretation list (what high vs low values mean, tinted good/bad), and a small RCA / usage note.

used in: counter-picker · create-widget-flow · data-source-config · widget-config-panel
<!-- variant: lower-better (canonical) — CPU utilisation counter detail -->
<article class="oo-metric-detail-card" tabindex="0" aria-label="Metric details: system.cpu.percent">
  <div class="oo-metric-detail-card__head">
    <h3 class="oo-metric-detail-card__name">system.cpu.percent</h3>
    <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__goal">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg>
      Lower is better
    </span>
  </div>

  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Description</p>
  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__desc">Percentage of total CPU time in use across all cores, from <strong>0%</strong> (idle) to <strong>100%</strong> (fully utilised). Used for load monitoring, alerting and capacity planning.</p>

  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Interpretation</p>
  <ul class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp">
    <li class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row--bad">
      <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__arrow" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg></span>
      <p><strong>High values:</strong> above 80% indicates CPU saturation and potential performance issues.</p>
    </li>
    <li class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row--good">
      <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__arrow" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg></span>
      <p><strong>Low values:</strong> below 5% means the CPU is mostly idle — normal during off-peak windows.</p>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <div class="oo-metric-detail-card__note">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 16v-4M12 8h.01"/></svg>
    <p><strong>RCA:</strong> when high, correlate with related counters, recent config changes and active alerts on the same source.</p>
  </div>
</article>

<!-- variant: higher-better — free-memory counter detail -->
<article class="oo-metric-detail-card" aria-label="Metric details: system.memory.free.percent">
  <div class="oo-metric-detail-card__head">
    <h3 class="oo-metric-detail-card__name">system.memory.free.percent</h3>
    <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__goal">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg>
      Higher is better
    </span>
  </div>

  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Description</p>
  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__desc">Percentage of physical memory currently free and available for allocation.</p>

  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Interpretation</p>
  <ul class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp">
    <li class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row--good">
      <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__arrow" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg></span>
      <p><strong>High values:</strong> plenty of headroom for new allocations.</p>
    </li>
    <li class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row--bad">
      <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__arrow" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg></span>
      <p><strong>Low values:</strong> can trigger swapping and degraded performance.</p>
    </li>
  </ul>

  <div class="oo-metric-detail-card__note">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><path d="M12 16v-4M12 8h.01"/></svg>
    <p><strong>RCA:</strong> when low, check for memory leaks, oversized caches and recent deploys on the host.</p>
  </div>
</article>

<!-- variant: compact — latency counter, single interpretation, no RCA note -->
<article class="oo-metric-detail-card oo-metric-detail-card--compact" aria-label="Metric details: network.service.latency.ms">
  <div class="oo-metric-detail-card__head">
    <h3 class="oo-metric-detail-card__name">network.service.latency.ms</h3>
    <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__goal">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg>
      Lower is better
    </span>
  </div>

  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Description</p>
  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__desc">Round-trip latency to the monitored network service, in milliseconds.</p>

  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Interpretation</p>
  <ul class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp">
    <li class="oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row oo-metric-detail-card__interp-row--bad">
      <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__arrow" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 19V5M5 12l7-7 7 7"/></svg></span>
      <p><strong>High values:</strong> suggest congestion or routing issues.</p>
    </li>
  </ul>
</article>

<!-- state: disabled — counter unavailable for the selected source -->
<article class="oo-metric-detail-card oo-metric-detail-card--compact is-disabled" aria-disabled="true" aria-label="Metric details unavailable: apm.transaction.response.time.ms">
  <div class="oo-metric-detail-card__head">
    <h3 class="oo-metric-detail-card__name">apm.transaction.response.time.ms</h3>
    <span class="oo-metric-detail-card__goal">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12l7 7 7-7"/></svg>
      Lower is better
    </span>
  </div>
  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__label">Description</p>
  <p class="oo-metric-detail-card__desc">Not collected for this data source. Pick a source that exposes APM transaction metrics.</p>
</article>
NOC KPI Counter tiles/noc-kpi
248
Monitors
3
Critical
3
Warning
234
Up
8
Down
neutralcriticalwarningupdownrowselectable

Small NOC wallboard header counter: a big status-colored value over a quiet uppercase label (Monitors / Critical / Warning / Up / Down). Ships as a row (.oo-noc-kpi-row); tone modifiers recolor only the value, and tiles can be promoted to single-select status-filter buttons with hover, selected and disabled states.

used in: noc-wallboard · noc-view-header
<!-- variant: row — static NOC wallboard header counters -->
<div class="oo-noc-kpi-row" role="group" aria-label="Monitor status summary">
  <div class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--neutral">
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__v">248</div>
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Monitors</div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--critical">
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__v">3</div>
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Critical</div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--warning">
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__v">3</div>
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Warning</div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--up">
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__v">234</div>
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Up</div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--down">
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__v">8</div>
    <div class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Down</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: selectable — single-select status filter (Critical pre-selected) -->
<div class="oo-noc-kpi-row" role="group" aria-label="Filter wallboard by status">
  <button type="button" class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--critical" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Critical monitors: 3">
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__v">3</span>
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Critical</span>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--warning" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Warning monitors: 3">
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__v">3</span>
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Warning</span>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--up" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Up monitors: 234">
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__v">234</span>
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Up</span>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled — metric unavailable -->
<div class="oo-noc-kpi-row">
  <button type="button" class="oo-noc-kpi oo-noc-kpi--down" disabled aria-label="Down monitors: unavailable">
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__v">&mdash;</span>
    <span class="oo-noc-kpi__l">Down</span>
  </button>
</div>
NOC KPI Tile tiles/noc-tile
mq-broker
Queue Depth
14.2k
vpn-gateway
Tunnels Up
142
critwarnok

A KPI tile for the NOC wallboard grid: a severity status stripe and pulsing dot, a monitor name, a sublabel, a large mono value with optional unit, and an inline sparkline of recent history. Three variants — crit (red) / warn (orange) / ok (green) — drive accent, border tint and background wash from one local token. Presentational by default; renders as a button/link for drill-down with hover, focus and disabled states.

used in: noc-view · noc-grid
<!-- variant: crit · interactive (drills into the monitor) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-noc-tile oo-noc-tile--crit" aria-label="core-router-01, CPU Load, critical: 94 percent">
  <span class="oo-noc-tile__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__name">core-router-01</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__sub">CPU Load</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__value">94<span class="oo-noc-tile__unit">%</span></div>
  <svg class="oo-noc-tile__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
    <path d="M0 18 L20 14 L40 16 L60 9 L80 12 L100 6 L120 8 L140 4 L160 7 L180 3 L200 6 L220 2 L240 5 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".14"/>
    <path d="M0 18 L20 14 L40 16 L60 9 L80 12 L100 6 L120 8 L140 4 L160 7 L180 3 L200 6 L220 2 L240 5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
</button>

<!-- variant: warn -->
<article class="oo-noc-tile oo-noc-tile--warn" role="group" aria-label="mq-broker, Queue Depth, warning: 14.2 thousand">
  <span class="oo-noc-tile__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__name">mq-broker</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__sub">Queue Depth</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__value">14.2<span class="oo-noc-tile__unit">k</span></div>
  <svg class="oo-noc-tile__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
    <path d="M0 16 L20 17 L40 13 L60 15 L80 11 L100 14 L120 10 L140 13 L160 9 L180 12 L200 11 L220 8 L240 10 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".14"/>
    <path d="M0 16 L20 17 L40 13 L60 15 L80 11 L100 14 L120 10 L140 13 L160 9 L180 12 L200 11 L220 8 L240 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
</article>

<!-- variant: ok -->
<article class="oo-noc-tile oo-noc-tile--ok" role="group" aria-label="vpn-gateway, Tunnels Up, healthy: 142">
  <span class="oo-noc-tile__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__name">vpn-gateway</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__sub">Tunnels Up</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__value">142</div>
  <svg class="oo-noc-tile__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
    <path d="M0 20 L20 19 L40 21 L60 18 L80 20 L100 19 L120 21 L140 18 L160 20 L180 19 L200 20 L220 18 L240 19 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".14"/>
    <path d="M0 20 L20 19 L40 21 L60 18 L80 20 L100 19 L120 21 L140 18 L160 20 L180 19 L200 20 L220 18 L240 19" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
</article>

<!-- variant: ok · state: disabled (stale / monitor paused) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-noc-tile oo-noc-tile--ok is-disabled" disabled aria-label="sql-replica, Connections, monitor paused">
  <span class="oo-noc-tile__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__name">sql-replica</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__sub">Connections</div>
  <div class="oo-noc-tile__value">312</div>
  <svg class="oo-noc-tile__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
    <path d="M0 19 L20 20 L40 18 L60 21 L80 19 L100 20 L120 18 L140 20 L160 19 L180 21 L200 18 L220 20 L240 19 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" fill-opacity=".14"/>
    <path d="M0 19 L20 20 L40 18 L60 21 L80 19 L100 20 L120 18 L140 20 L160 19 L180 21 L200 18 L220 20 L240 19" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
  </svg>
</button>
Widget Template Card tiles/template-card
defaultlib

Add-Widget template selector: a teal type glyph over a name (plus an optional uppercase type subtitle in the library variant). Clicking it launches the create-widget flow; hover lifts the card 2px and switches its border to teal with brighter text.

used in: add-widget-panel · create-widget-flow · widget-library-predefined · widget-library-user-defined
<!-- variant: default (Chart) — square type-grid tile in the Add Widget panel -->
<button type="button" class="oo-template-card" aria-label="Add Chart widget">
  <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 17l5-6 4 4 5-8 4 6"/></svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-template-card__name">Chart</span>
</button>

<!-- variant: default (Gauge) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-template-card" aria-label="Add Gauge widget">
  <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 18a8 8 0 1 1 16 0"/><path d="m12 14 4-4"/></svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-template-card__name">Gauge</span>
</button>

<!-- variant: lib — library card with an uppercase type subtitle -->
<button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" aria-label="Add Service Health Overview, a Grid widget">
  <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M3 14h18M9 4v16"/></svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-template-card__name">Service Health Overview</span>
  <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Grid</span>
</button>

<!-- state: disabled (Sankey unavailable for this data source) -->
<button type="button" class="oo-template-card" disabled aria-label="Sankey widget unavailable">
  <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M3 5h3v6H3zM3 13h3v6H3zM18 7h3v4h-3zM18 14h3v4h-3z"/><path d="M6 8c6 0 6-1 12 1M6 16c6 0 6 0 12-1" stroke-width="1.4"/></svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-template-card__name">Sankey</span>
</button>
Widget Card tiles/widget-card

Top Applications by Response Time

Table
Widget body

Error Rate Trend

Area
Widget body

Service Map Health

KPI
Widget body
defaultai-toolwide

Dashboard widget container shell: header with drag grip, title and tag plus a refresh / AI / more / remove toolbar, over a flexible body slot, with a reveal-on-hover bottom-right resize handle. Body shown here as a labelled placeholder.

used in: dashboard-canvas · widget-grid · fullscreen-widget
<!-- variant: default — full chrome with grip, title, tag, toolbar, placeholder body and resize handle -->
<article class="oo-widget-card" style="width:340px">
  <div class="oo-widget-card__head">
    <span class="oo-widget-card__grip" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="9" cy="6" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="6" r="1.4" /><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="1.4" /><circle cx="9" cy="18" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="18" r="1.4" /></svg>
    </span>
    <h3 class="oo-widget-card__title">Top Applications by Response Time</h3>
    <span class="oo-widget-card__tag">Table</span>
    <div class="oo-widget-card__tools">
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool oo-widget-card__tool--ai" aria-label="Analyze with AI">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3l1.4 4.6L18 9l-4.6 1.4L12 15l-1.4-4.6L6 9l4.6-1.4z" /><path d="M18.5 14l.8 2.3 2.2.7-2.2.7-.8 2.3-.8-2.3-2.2-.7 2.2-.7z" /></svg>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool" aria-label="Refresh widget">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7L21 8" /><path d="M21 3v5h-5" /></svg>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool" aria-label="More options" aria-haspopup="menu">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.6" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.6" /><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.6" /></svg>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool" aria-label="Remove widget">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12" /></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-widget-card__body">
    <div class="oo-widget-card__placeholder">Widget body</div>
  </div>
  <span class="oo-widget-card__resize" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v6h-6M21 21l-7-7M9 21H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1v-5" /></svg>
  </span>
</article>

<!-- variant: ai-tool — compact toolbar (AI + more only), different tag -->
<article class="oo-widget-card" style="width:340px">
  <div class="oo-widget-card__head">
    <span class="oo-widget-card__grip" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="9" cy="6" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="6" r="1.4" /><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="1.4" /><circle cx="9" cy="18" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="18" r="1.4" /></svg>
    </span>
    <h3 class="oo-widget-card__title">Error Rate Trend</h3>
    <span class="oo-widget-card__tag">Area</span>
    <div class="oo-widget-card__tools">
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool oo-widget-card__tool--ai" aria-label="Analyze with AI">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3l1.4 4.6L18 9l-4.6 1.4L12 15l-1.4-4.6L6 9l4.6-1.4z" /><path d="M18.5 14l.8 2.3 2.2.7-2.2.7-.8 2.3-.8-2.3-2.2-.7 2.2-.7z" /></svg>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool" aria-label="More options" aria-haspopup="menu">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.6" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.6" /><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.6" /></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-widget-card__body">
    <div class="oo-widget-card__placeholder">Widget body</div>
  </div>
  <span class="oo-widget-card__resize" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v6h-6M21 21l-7-7M9 21H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1v-5" /></svg>
  </span>
</article>

<!-- state: disabled — refresh tool disabled (e.g. while loading) -->
<article class="oo-widget-card" style="width:340px">
  <div class="oo-widget-card__head">
    <span class="oo-widget-card__grip" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><circle cx="9" cy="6" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="6" r="1.4" /><circle cx="9" cy="12" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="12" r="1.4" /><circle cx="9" cy="18" r="1.4" /><circle cx="15" cy="18" r="1.4" /></svg>
    </span>
    <h3 class="oo-widget-card__title">Service Map Health</h3>
    <span class="oo-widget-card__tag">KPI</span>
    <div class="oo-widget-card__tools">
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool" aria-label="Refresh widget" disabled>
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7L21 8" /><path d="M21 3v5h-5" /></svg>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-widget-card__tool" aria-label="Remove widget">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12" /></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-widget-card__body">
    <div class="oo-widget-card__placeholder">Widget body</div>
  </div>
  <span class="oo-widget-card__resize" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15v6h-6M21 21l-7-7M9 21H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1v-5" /></svg>
  </span>
</article>

widgets17

AI Insights Widget widgets/aiinsights
  • anomaly 96% conf
    Disk anomaly · DATASTORE-01
    Usage 80.9% — 3.1σ above baseline
  • forecast 88% conf
    sql-primary sessions trending up
    Will breach 350 in ~3h
  • noise 90% conf
    38 flapping alerts suppressed
    k8s-prod restarts grouped → 1 incident
feedalt-seedstatic-listinteractive-row

The dashboard's AI Insights feed renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="aiinsights") is filled by the OOW.aiinsights renderer with a role="list" column of compact insight cards. Each card carries a coloured severity rail on its left edge, an uppercase "kind" label (anomaly / forecast / root cause / noise) tinted by its own category colour, a right-aligned mono confidence read-out, a bold title and a muted one-line description. The renderer emits structure only; the severity rail (--ins-sev) and kind tint (--ins-kc) are injected inline as var(--token) references, so aiinsights.css owns all presentation and nothing hardcodes palette hex. Confidence percentages are the only seed-driven data, so output is deterministic and renders identically every load. Rows lift on hover, expose a keyboard focus ring when made interactive for drill-down (rendered as button/link), and an aria-disabled feed dims the whole set for no-data / loading. Depends on the shared rng / esc utils with small local fallbacks.

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · widget-fullscreen · ai-generate-widget
<!-- variant: feed (default — declarative mount filled by OOW.aiinsights) -->
<div class="oo-aiinsights" data-widget="aiinsights" data-seed="53"
     aria-label="AI insights feed"
     style="width:320px;height:220px"></div>

<!-- variant: alt-seed (same layout, different seeded confidence values) -->
<div class="oo-aiinsights" data-widget="aiinsights" data-seed="7"
     aria-label="AI insights feed"
     style="width:320px;height:220px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled (no recent analysis — feed dimmed, interaction frozen) -->
<div class="oo-aiinsights is-disabled" data-widget="aiinsights" data-seed="53" aria-disabled="true"
     aria-label="AI insights feed, no recent analysis"
     style="width:320px;height:220px"></div>

<!-- variant: static-list (script-free anatomy — severity rail + kind tint + confidence) -->
<div class="oo-aiinsights" style="width:320px;height:220px">
  <ul class="oo-aiinsights__list" role="list" aria-label="AI insights feed">

    <li class="oo-aiinsights__item" style="--ins-sev:var(--red);--ins-kc:var(--purple2)">
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__head">
        <span class="oo-aiinsights__type">anomaly</span>
        <span class="oo-aiinsights__conf">96% conf</span>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__title">Disk anomaly · DATASTORE-01</div>
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__desc">Usage 80.9% — 3.1&#963; above baseline</div>
    </li>

    <li class="oo-aiinsights__item" style="--ins-sev:var(--orange);--ins-kc:var(--orange)">
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__head">
        <span class="oo-aiinsights__type">forecast</span>
        <span class="oo-aiinsights__conf">88% conf</span>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__title">sql-primary sessions trending up</div>
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__desc">Will breach 350 in ~3h</div>
    </li>

    <!-- interactive row: drill into the correlated incident -->
    <li>
      <button class="oo-aiinsights__item" style="--ins-sev:var(--blue);--ins-kc:var(--blue)"
              aria-label="Open root-cause group: 6 alerts share one root cause, 82% confidence">
        <div class="oo-aiinsights__head">
          <span class="oo-aiinsights__type">root cause</span>
          <span class="oo-aiinsights__conf">82% conf</span>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-aiinsights__title">6 alerts share one root cause</div>
        <div class="oo-aiinsights__desc">edge-fw-01 throughput saturation</div>
      </button>
    </li>

    <li class="oo-aiinsights__item" style="--ins-sev:var(--green);--ins-kc:var(--green)">
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__head">
        <span class="oo-aiinsights__type">noise</span>
        <span class="oo-aiinsights__conf">90% conf</span>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__title">38 flapping alerts suppressed</div>
      <div class="oo-aiinsights__desc">k8s-prod restarts grouped &#8594; 1 incident</div>
    </li>

  </ul>
</div>
Active Alerts Table widgets/alerts
criticalwarninginfoclear

Active-alerts table widget: a vertically scrollable, sticky-header table where each row is a severity badge (Critical / Warning / Info / Clear), the alert message, a source IP and a mono "Xm ago" timestamp. Rendered by the pure OOW.alerts renderer from a deterministic seed; severity badges use the --*-bg tints. The mount is the scroll region and is keyboard-focusable; rows carry a hover wash, and an aria-disabled table dims for no-data/loading.

used in: dashboard-canvas · create-widget-modal · ai-chat-answer
<!-- alerts · active-alerts table widget. Declarative mounts only —
     OOW.alerts (alerts.js) renders each one from its data-* attributes
     (deterministic seed); auto-mount.js wires them up. No inline scripts.
     Each mount becomes a scrollable, focusable region: a sticky-header table
     of Severity badge / Alert / Source IP / mono Time-ago rows. -->

<!-- variant: default (seed 43 — the canonical "Active Alerts" dashboard widget) -->
<div class="oo-alerts" data-widget="alerts" data-seed="43" aria-label="Active alerts"
     style="width:360px;height:240px"></div>

<!-- variant: alternate dataset (different seed — different severity mix) -->
<div class="oo-alerts" data-widget="alerts" data-seed="7" aria-label="Active alerts — edge fabric"
     style="width:360px;height:240px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled / no-data / loading (dimmed, interaction frozen) -->
<div class="oo-alerts" data-widget="alerts" data-seed="12" aria-disabled="true"
     aria-label="Active alerts (loading)" style="width:360px;height:240px"></div>
Anomaly Detection Widget widgets/anomaly
bluepurpletealwide-band

The dashboard's AI/ML anomaly-detection renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="anomaly") is filled by the OOW.anomaly renderer with a single token-themed SVG: a seeded time-series drawn as a smooth cubic-bezier line, wrapped in a shaded confidence band (the learned baseline ± a tolerance), a faint dashed mean baseline, and any sample that breaches the band flagged as a red dot inside a soft pulsing ring. The series colour is data-driven (data-color, a SVAR key or hex) and injected as generated SVG data, while the band opacity, baseline and the always-red anomaly markers are decoupled from the series colour and themed from design tokens. Output is deterministic from opts.seed, so it renders identically every load. Depends on the shared series / smoothPath / rng / SVAR utils. Presentational by default, with a focus ring when the mount is focusable and a stale/paused disabled treatment.

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · widget-fullscreen · ai-insights-answer · ai-generate-widget
<!-- variant: blue (default — confidence band + flagged anomaly points) -->
<div class="oo-anomaly" data-widget="anomaly" data-seed="51"
     role="img" aria-label="Response-time anomaly detection: series tracks its confidence band except for two flagged spikes"
     style="width:340px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- variant: purple (AI/ML accent colour) -->
<div class="oo-anomaly" data-widget="anomaly" data-seed="7" data-color="purple"
     role="img" aria-label="Disk-usage anomaly on DATASTORE-01, 3.1 sigma above baseline"
     style="width:340px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- variant: wide-band (looser tolerance, teal series) -->
<div class="oo-anomaly" data-widget="anomaly" data-seed="33" data-color="teal" data-band="20"
     role="img" aria-label="CPU utilization with a wide confidence band, no active anomalies"
     style="width:340px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled (stale — monitor paused, no recent data) -->
<div class="oo-anomaly is-disabled" data-widget="anomaly" data-seed="51" aria-disabled="true"
     role="img" aria-label="Anomaly detection, no recent data"
     style="width:340px;height:180px"></div>
Chart Widget widgets/chart
arealinebarsbarhbarsareaslinemulti

The dashboard's core time-series chart renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="chart") is filled by the OOW.chart renderer with a single token-themed SVG: a 4-row gridline backdrop, right-aligned y-axis labels, and one or more seeded series drawn as smooth cubic-bezier line/area paths or rectangular bars. Seven styles — area, line, bar, sbar (semi bars), hbar (horizontal top-N), sarea, sline — plus a multi option for overlaid series. Output is deterministic from opts.seed, so charts render identically every load. Depends on the shared series / smoothPath / SVAR utils; grid and labels are decoupled from the series colour and themed from design tokens. Presentational by default, with a focus ring when the mount is focusable and a stale/paused disabled treatment.

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · widget-fullscreen · ai-insights-answer
<!-- variant: area (smooth bezier with gradient fill — the default) -->
<div class="oo-chart" data-widget="chart" data-style="area" data-seed="7"
     role="img" aria-label="CPU utilization trend over the last hour, area chart"
     style="width:320px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- variant: line (no fill, data points on) -->
<div class="oo-chart" data-widget="chart" data-style="line" data-seed="19" data-color="blue" data-points="true"
     role="img" aria-label="Service latency, line chart"
     style="width:320px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- variant: bar (vertical bars per interval) -->
<div class="oo-chart" data-widget="chart" data-style="bar" data-seed="23" data-color="purple"
     role="img" aria-label="Requests per minute, bar chart"
     style="width:320px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- variant: hbar (horizontal top-N bars) -->
<div class="oo-chart" data-widget="chart" data-style="hbar" data-seed="31" data-color="orange"
     role="img" aria-label="Top endpoints by traffic, horizontal bar chart"
     style="width:320px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled (stale — monitor paused, no recent data) -->
<div class="oo-chart is-disabled" data-widget="chart" data-style="area" data-seed="7" aria-disabled="true"
     role="img" aria-label="CPU utilization trend, no recent data"
     style="width:320px;height:180px"></div>
Event Timeline widgets/events
defaultalternate-seed

Vertical event timeline widget: a scrollable column of up to 8 rows, each a coloured left rail with a dot marker, an event description and a right-mono timestamp. Rendered by the pure OOW.events renderer from a deterministic seed; row accents cycle through the severity tokens (teal/blue/orange/purple/green) via an inline --ev-c var. Rows carry a hover wash and, when made interactive for drill-down, a keyboard focus ring; an aria-disabled timeline dims for no-data/loading.

used in: dashboard-canvas · create-widget-modal · widget-fullscreen
<!-- events · vertical event timeline widget. Declarative mounts only —
     OOW.events (events.js) renders each one from its data-* attributes;
     auto-mount.js wires them up. No inline scripts. -->

<!-- variant: default (seed 47 — "Recent Events") -->
<div class="oo-events" data-widget="events" data-seed="47" aria-label="Recent Events"
     style="width:340px;height:240px"></div>

<!-- variant: alternate stream (different seed → different timestamps) -->
<div class="oo-events" data-widget="events" data-seed="12" aria-label="Audit Trail"
     style="width:340px;height:240px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled / no-data (dimmed, interaction frozen) -->
<div class="oo-events" data-widget="events" data-seed="91" aria-disabled="true"
     aria-label="Event Timeline (loading)" style="width:340px;height:240px"></div>
Forecast Widget widgets/forecast
tealbluewarnlong-horizon

The dashboard's capacity / predictive forecast renderer. A declarative mount (data-widget="forecast") is filled by the OOW.forecast renderer with a single token-themed SVG: a 4-row gridline backdrop, right-aligned y-axis labels, a solid line of observed history, a dashed line projecting the forecast horizon, a confidence cone that widens downrange as uncertainty grows, a dashed vertical separator marking 'now' (observed vs forecast), and a marker dot at the handoff. The forecast continues as a seeded random-walk from the last observed value, so output is deterministic from opts.seed and renders identically every load. The series colour is injected as generated SVG data; the grid, axis labels, separator and cone opacity are decoupled from it and themed from design tokens. Presentational by default, with a focus ring when the mount is focusable and a stale/paused disabled treatment. opts: seed, color (SVAR key or hex), n (history samples), fc (forecast samples).

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · ai-insights-answer · ai-copilot-chat
<!-- variant: capacity forecast (teal, the default — observed line + dashed projection + confidence cone) -->
<div class="oo-forecast" data-widget="forecast" data-seed="61"
     role="img" aria-label="Capacity forecast — observed history with a 12-step projection and confidence cone"
     style="width:340px;height:190px"></div>

<!-- variant: blue (longer horizon — more forecast steps widen the cone) -->
<div class="oo-forecast" data-widget="forecast" data-seed="11" data-color="blue" data-fc="18"
     role="img" aria-label="core-router-01 CPU forecast over the next 24 hours"
     style="width:340px;height:190px"></div>

<!-- variant: warn (orange — projected to breach a threshold) -->
<div class="oo-forecast" data-widget="forecast" data-seed="17" data-color="orange"
     role="img" aria-label="sql-primary session forecast — projected to breach 350 in about 3 hours"
     style="width:340px;height:190px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled (stale — monitor paused, nothing to project from) -->
<div class="oo-forecast is-disabled" data-widget="forecast" data-seed="61" aria-disabled="true"
     role="img" aria-label="Capacity forecast, no recent data"
     style="width:340px;height:190px"></div>
Gauge Dial widgets/gauge
defaultauto-thresholdseverity-color

A 180° semicircular progress gauge widget. A muted track arc, a coloured value arc whose sweep maps a 0–100 value, and centred text — a large mono value with a small muted caption. The arc colour is token-driven via --oo-gauge-fill: teal by default, an explicit severity token, or an 'auto' threshold mode (green / orange / red as the value rises). Rendered by OOW.gauge from a declarative [data-widget="gauge"] mount; deterministic from data-seed. Refined with a draw-in animation, hover glow, keyboard focus ring, loading and disabled treatments.

used in: create-widget-modal · add-widget-panel · dashboard-grid · noc-wallboard
<!-- variant: default · teal CPU gauge, value from seed -->
<div class="oo-gauge" data-widget="gauge" data-seed="5" data-label="% Avg CPU"
     style="width:260px;height:170px"></div>

<!-- variant: auto-threshold · high value maps to a critical (red) arc -->
<div class="oo-gauge" data-widget="gauge" data-value="91" data-color="auto" data-label="% Disk Used"
     style="width:260px;height:170px"></div>

<!-- variant: severity-color · explicit healthy (green) arc -->
<div class="oo-gauge" data-widget="gauge" data-value="42" data-color="green" data-label="% Memory Free"
     style="width:260px;height:170px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled · no-data / unavailable gauge, dimmed + desaturated -->
<div class="oo-gauge is-disabled" data-widget="gauge" data-value="0" data-label="No data"
     aria-disabled="true" style="width:260px;height:170px"></div>
Status Grid Table widgets/grid
status-upstatus-downscrollable

Tabular status widget: a scrollable Monitor / Traffic / Interface / Status table with a sticky header, hairline row dividers and a hover wash. Each row leads with a coloured status dot and ends with an up/down state chip, all derived from a deterministic seed by the pure OOW.grid renderer; the mount itself is the scroll container so the table scrolls independently of the widget body. Rows are keyboard-focusable for drill-down (base focus ring); an aria-disabled grid dims the whole table for no-data / loading.

used in: dashboard-canvas · create-widget-modal
<!-- grid · tabular status table widget. Declarative mounts only —
     OOW.grid (grid.js) renders each one from its data-* attributes;
     auto-mount.js wires them up. No inline scripts. The mount is the
     scroll container; the renderer writes a semantic <table> inside. -->

<!-- variant: status-up (seed 41 — full 8-row Monitor/Traffic/Interface/Status, mostly Up) -->
<div class="oo-grid" data-widget="grid" data-seed="41" aria-label="Monitor status"
     style="width:360px;height:230px"></div>

<!-- variant: status-down mix (different seed surfaces Down rows + red dots) -->
<div class="oo-grid" data-widget="grid" data-seed="3" aria-label="Interface status"
     style="width:360px;height:230px"></div>

<!-- variant: scrollable (compact stage, 8 rows overflow → header stays sticky) -->
<div class="oo-grid" data-widget="grid" data-seed="17" aria-label="Monitor traffic"
     style="width:360px;height:140px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled / no-data (dimmed, interaction frozen) -->
<div class="oo-grid" data-widget="grid" data-seed="41" aria-disabled="true" aria-label="Monitor status (loading)"
     style="width:360px;height:230px"></div>
Severity Heat Map widgets/heatmap
  • Healthy
  • Low
  • Warning
  • Major
  • Critical
defaultdensecompactlegend

A hexagonal heat-map widget rendered by OOW.heatmap: a honeycomb grid of pointy-top hexagons coloured on the 5-step severity scale (green to red), seeded so it draws identically every load. Useful for showing alert / availability density across many monitors at a glance. The renderer emits an inline SVG into a declarative mount; CSS supplies the inter-cell gap stroke, hover lift and disabled state from design tokens, and an optional standalone severity legend documents the colour scale. Grid size is tunable via data-cols / data-rows.

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · widget-fullscreen
<!-- variant: default — 14×7 alert severity grid (seed 21) -->
<div class="oo-heatmap" data-widget="heatmap" data-seed="21"
     role="img" aria-label="Alert severity heat map, 14 by 7 hexagonal grid"
     style="width:380px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: dense — larger grid for a wide dashboard tile -->
<div class="oo-heatmap" data-widget="heatmap" data-seed="7" data-cols="20" data-rows="9"
     role="img" aria-label="Severity heat map, 20 by 9 hexagonal grid"
     style="width:380px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: compact — small inline preview -->
<div class="oo-heatmap" data-widget="heatmap" data-seed="44" data-cols="8" data-rows="5"
     role="img" aria-label="Severity heat map, 8 by 5 hexagonal grid"
     style="width:200px;height:140px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled — inert / loading placeholder -->
<div class="oo-heatmap is-disabled" data-widget="heatmap" data-seed="21" aria-disabled="true"
     role="img" aria-label="Severity heat map (unavailable)"
     style="width:380px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: legend — severity scale key (standalone, not a renderer mount) -->
<ul class="oo-heatmap-legend" aria-label="Severity scale, healthy to critical">
  <li><span class="oo-heatmap-legend__sw oo-heatmap-legend__sw--0"></span>Healthy</li>
  <li><span class="oo-heatmap-legend__sw oo-heatmap-legend__sw--1"></span>Low</li>
  <li><span class="oo-heatmap-legend__sw oo-heatmap-legend__sw--2"></span>Warning</li>
  <li><span class="oo-heatmap-legend__sw oo-heatmap-legend__sw--3"></span>Major</li>
  <li><span class="oo-heatmap-legend__sw oo-heatmap-legend__sw--4"></span>Critical</li>
</ul>
Geo Distribution Map widgets/map
defaultdensecompact

A stylised geographic distribution map rendered by OOW.map: a tokenised plate over a faint coordinate grid scattered with ~11 severity-coloured data points (green to red), each wrapped in a soft, slowly pulsing halo and seeded so it draws identically every load. Used to show where monitored locations / datacenters sit on the health spectrum at a glance. The renderer emits an inline SVG into a declarative mount; CSS supplies the plate, grid stroke, halo pulse, hover lift, focus ring and disabled state from design tokens — only the point fills are palette hexes (generated SVG data). Point count is tunable via data-points.

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · widget-catalog · widget-fullscreen
<!-- variant: default — datacenter geo map, ~11 severity-coloured points (seed 71) -->
<div class="oo-map" data-widget="map" data-seed="71"
     role="img" aria-label="Datacenter map showing severity-coloured locations"
     style="width:360px;height:220px"></div>

<!-- variant: dense — busier distribution for a wide dashboard tile (seed 7) -->
<div class="oo-map" data-widget="map" data-seed="7" data-points="18"
     role="img" aria-label="Geographic distribution map, 18 monitored locations"
     style="width:360px;height:220px"></div>

<!-- variant: compact — small inline preview (seed 44) -->
<div class="oo-map" data-widget="map" data-seed="44" data-points="6"
     role="img" aria-label="Location map, 6 sites"
     style="width:220px;height:150px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled — inert / loading placeholder -->
<div class="oo-map is-disabled" data-widget="map" data-seed="71" aria-disabled="true"
     role="img" aria-label="Datacenter map (unavailable)"
     style="width:360px;height:220px"></div>
Numeric Grid Widget widgets/numeric
CPU 62%
Memory 48%
Disk 71%
Network 34Mb
Latency 88ms
Errors 5/m
CPU 62%
Latency 88ms
CPU --%
Memory --%
defaulttone-cellscompactlive-mount

Dashboard widget renderer that paints a 3×2 grid of compact KPI boxes — each a quiet label over a large tone-colored mono value with a trailing unit (CPU %, Memory %, Disk %, Network Mb, Latency ms, Errors /m). Registered as OOW.numeric and auto-mounted from a [data-widget="numeric"] mount; values are deterministic from data-seed. Tone modifiers recolor only the value; supports a compact density and a disabled/no-data state.

used in: dashboard-grid · add-widget-panel · create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: live mount (auto-rendered by OOW.numeric from data-seed) -->
<div class="oo-numeric" data-widget="numeric" data-seed="14"
     style="width:340px;height:180px" role="group" aria-label="SLA summary KPI grid"></div>

<!-- variant: static markup (the structure the renderer emits) -->
<div class="oo-numeric" style="width:340px;height:180px" role="group" aria-label="Infrastructure KPI grid">
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--teal">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">CPU</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">62<span class="oo-numeric-unit">%</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--blue">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Memory</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">48<span class="oo-numeric-unit">%</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--orange">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Disk</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">71<span class="oo-numeric-unit">%</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--green">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Network</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">34<span class="oo-numeric-unit">Mb</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--purple">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Latency</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">88<span class="oo-numeric-unit">ms</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--red">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Errors</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">5<span class="oo-numeric-unit">/m</span></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: compact + focusable cell (tabindex enables drill-down focus ring) -->
<div class="oo-numeric oo-numeric--compact" style="width:300px;height:150px" role="group" aria-label="Compact KPI grid">
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--teal" tabindex="0">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">CPU</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">62<span class="oo-numeric-unit">%</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--purple">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Latency</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">88<span class="oo-numeric-unit">ms</span></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled (no-data / loading) -->
<div class="oo-numeric is-disabled" style="width:300px;height:150px" role="group" aria-label="KPI grid, no data" aria-disabled="true">
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--teal">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">CPU</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">--<span class="oo-numeric-unit">%</span></span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-numeric-cell oo-numeric-cell--blue">
    <span class="oo-numeric-label">Memory</span>
    <span class="oo-numeric-value">--<span class="oo-numeric-unit">%</span></span>
  </div>
</div>
Pie / Donut Chart widgets/pie
donutpieno-legend

Distribution widget rendering five proportional slices as a pie or, by default, a donut with a center total. A token-colored value legend sits beside the chart; hovering the chart spotlights one wedge and dims the rest. Deterministic from a seed via the OOW.pie renderer mounted by auto-mount.js.

used in: dashboard-canvas · add-widget-panel · create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: donut (default) — proportional slices, center total + value legend -->
<div class="oo-pie" data-widget="pie" data-seed="9" data-donut="true" data-label="Total"
     style="width:360px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: pie (full) — solid wedges, no center hole -->
<div class="oo-pie" data-widget="pie" data-seed="4" data-donut="false"
     style="width:360px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: no-legend — compact donut for a small KPI tile -->
<div class="oo-pie" data-widget="pie" data-seed="21" data-donut="true" data-legend="false" data-label="Hosts"
     style="width:180px;height:180px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled — dimmed/greyed for a no-data or loading slot -->
<div class="oo-pie is-disabled" data-widget="pie" data-seed="7" data-donut="true" data-label="Total"
     style="width:360px;height:200px" aria-disabled="true"></div>
Query Value widgets/query
tealbluepurpleorangegreeninteractive

Single-value KPI widget: one oversized numeric value, a muted metric caption, a signed percent delta (green up / red down) and a trend sparkline. Rendered by OOW.query from a declarative data-widget mount and deterministic from data-seed; accent modifiers recolour only the sparkline while the delta colour stays semantic. An optional interactive variant turns the tile into a focusable drill-down target.

used in: dashboard-canvas · create-widget-modal · add-widget-panel
<!-- query · single big numeric value + sparkline + signed % delta. -->
<!-- Each tile is a declarative mount hydrated by OOW.query (query.js) from its -->
<!-- data-* options; the visible markup (.oo-query root + children) is produced -->
<!-- at runtime, so this fragment ships only the mounts. -->

<!-- variant: teal (default) · state: up — throughput trending up, green delta -->
<div data-widget="query" data-seed="98328" data-accent="teal"
     data-label="Total Requests / min"
     style="width:280px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: blue · state: up — custom metric caption -->
<div data-widget="query" data-seed="69615" data-accent="blue"
     data-label="Throughput / sec"
     style="width:280px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: purple · state: down — negative delta flips the badge red -->
<div data-widget="query" data-seed="127772" data-accent="purple"
     data-label="Active Sessions"
     style="width:280px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: interactive (orange) · state: down — focusable drill-down tile -->
<div data-widget="query" data-seed="12189" data-accent="orange"
     data-label="Errors / min" data-interactive="true"
     style="width:280px;height:200px"></div>
Sankey Flow widgets/sankey
dependency-flowalt-seed

Dependency Sankey widget — three left source tiers fan out to four right destinations through translucent bezier flow ribbons, each coloured by its source node. Rendered deterministically by OOW.sankey from a seed (no real data); hovering a ribbon peels focus by dimming the rest of the field. Category colours are emitted as var() token fills.

used in: create-widget-modal · add-widget-panel · dashboard-canvas
<!-- variant: dependency-flow (canonical, seed 81) — focusable mount, auto-rendered by OOW.sankey -->
<div class="oo-sankey" data-widget="sankey" data-seed="81"
     tabindex="0" role="img"
     aria-label="Service dependency Sankey: three source tiers (Ingress, Firewall, App Tier) flowing to four destinations (DB, Cache, External, Drop)"
     style="width:360px;height:250px"></div>

<!-- variant: alt-seed — same topology, different generated flow weights -->
<div class="oo-sankey" data-widget="sankey" data-seed="24"
     role="img" aria-label="Dependency Sankey, alternate topology"
     style="width:360px;height:250px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled — no-data / loading veil; not interactive -->
<div class="oo-sankey is-disabled" data-widget="sankey" data-seed="81"
     role="img" aria-disabled="true" aria-label="Sankey widget, disabled"
     style="width:360px;height:250px"></div>
Streamgraph widgets/stream
defaultalt-seedthree-band

Stacked streamgraph widget — N seeded series (4 by default) accumulate into translucent flowing bands across 24 intervals. A declarative mount (data-widget="stream") is filled by the OOW.stream renderer with a single SVG. The total stacked height is measured once to derive one stable y-scale shared by every band, so layers nest cleanly; each band is closed between its pre-stack floor and post-stack ceiling with a smooth cubic-bezier top edge. Output is deterministic from opts.seed, so the graph renders identically every load. Per-series category colours are emitted as var() token fills (no hardcoded hex). Hovering peels focus onto a single band; a focusable mount gains a keyboard ring and a stale/paused state veils the viz. Depends on the shared series / smoothPath utils.

used in: dashboard-grid · create-widget-modal · add-widget-panel · widget-fullscreen
<!-- variant: default (4 stacked series across 24 intervals) -->
<div class="oo-stream" data-widget="stream" data-seed="25"
     role="img" tabindex="0" aria-label="Traffic streamgraph, four stacked series over 24 intervals"
     style="width:480px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: alt-seed (same shape, different deterministic data) -->
<div class="oo-stream" data-widget="stream" data-seed="49"
     role="img" tabindex="0" aria-label="Traffic streamgraph, alternate sample"
     style="width:480px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: three-band (fewer series) -->
<div class="oo-stream" data-widget="stream" data-seed="13" data-bands="3"
     role="img" tabindex="0" aria-label="Traffic streamgraph, three stacked series"
     style="width:480px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled (stale — monitor paused, no recent data) -->
<div class="oo-stream is-disabled" data-widget="stream" data-seed="25" aria-disabled="true"
     role="img" aria-label="Traffic streamgraph, no recent data"
     style="width:480px;height:200px"></div>
Top N Bar List widgets/topn
tealbluepurplewith-unit

Horizontal Top-N ranked bar list widget: up to 8 rows, each a truncated entity name, a proportional horizontal bar (longest = the list max) and a right-aligned mono value with optional unit. Rendered by the pure OOW.topn renderer from a deterministic seed; a single --topn-c token recolours the bars (teal/blue/purple/…). Rows carry a hover wash and, when made interactive for drill-down, a keyboard focus ring; an aria-disabled list dims for no-data/loading.

used in: dashboard-canvas · create-widget-modal · ai-chat-answer
<!-- topn · horizontal Top-N bar list widget. Declarative mounts only —
     OOW.topn (topn.js) renders each one from its data-* attributes;
     auto-mount.js wires them up. No inline scripts. -->

<!-- variant: default (teal accent, seed 33 — "Top Talkers") -->
<div class="oo-topn" data-widget="topn" data-seed="33" aria-label="Top Talkers"
     style="width:340px;height:230px"></div>

<!-- variant: blue accent (different seed) -->
<div class="oo-topn" data-widget="topn" data-seed="7" data-color="blue" aria-label="Top Hosts by Traffic"
     style="width:340px;height:230px"></div>

<!-- variant: with-unit (purple accent, values suffixed "ms" — Top Hosts by Latency) -->
<div class="oo-topn" data-widget="topn" data-seed="33" data-color="purple" data-unit="ms"
     aria-label="Top Hosts by p95 Latency" style="width:340px;height:230px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled / no-data (dimmed, interaction frozen) -->
<div class="oo-topn" data-widget="topn" data-seed="12" aria-disabled="true" aria-label="Top N (loading)"
     style="width:340px;height:230px"></div>
Treemap widgets/treemap
defaultno-valuescompact

Space-filling treemap that sizes six token-colored cells in proportion to a metric, each labeled with a category name and value. Uses a squarified layout (Bruls et al.) so rectangles stay near-square, and hovering the chart spotlights one cell while dimming the rest. Deterministic from a seed via the OOW.treemap renderer mounted by auto-mount.js; tiny cells drop their labels automatically.

used in: dashboard-canvas · add-widget-panel · create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: default — squarified treemap, labels + values, hover to spotlight a cell -->
<div class="oo-treemap" data-widget="treemap" data-seed="29" data-label="Capacity by tier"
     style="width:360px;height:250px"></div>

<!-- variant: no-values — labels only, denser read for a smaller tile -->
<div class="oo-treemap" data-widget="treemap" data-seed="11" data-values="false" data-label="Traffic share"
     style="width:300px;height:200px"></div>

<!-- variant: compact — small slot; tiny cells drop their labels automatically -->
<div class="oo-treemap" data-widget="treemap" data-seed="6" data-label="Hosts by group"
     style="width:200px;height:150px"></div>

<!-- state: disabled — dimmed/greyed for a no-data or loading slot -->
<div class="oo-treemap is-disabled" data-widget="treemap" data-seed="29" data-label="Capacity by tier"
     style="width:360px;height:250px" aria-disabled="true"></div>

planes19

Add-Widget Panel planes/add-widget-panel
Add New Widget
Charts & Trends
Tables & Lists
Predefined Widgets
No user-defined widgets yet Create a widget and save it to reuse it here.
Add New Widget
Predefined Widgets
dockeddrawercreatepredefineduser-define-empty

Slide-in right "Add New Widget" panel: a titled header with a dismiss control, the Create / Predefined / User Define underline tabs, a search field, and a scrollable card grid. Composes the add-widget-tab, search-input and template-card atoms; tabs swap the body, search filters the cards, and the close button dismisses. Renders docked by default or as a fixed slide-in drawer via the --drawer modifier.

used in: dashboard-module · add-widget-flow · create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: assembled (docked) — Create tab active; tabs + search drive the body -->
<section class="oo-add-widget-panel" role="dialog" aria-label="Add new widget">
  <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__head">
    <span class="oo-add-widget-panel__title">Add New Widget</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-add-widget-panel__x" aria-label="Close add widget panel">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-aw-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Widget source">
    <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab on" role="tab" data-tab="create" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Create Widget</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="predefined" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">Predefined</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="userdefine" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">User Define</button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__search">
    <div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search widgets" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__body">
    <!-- create -->
    <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__tabpanel" data-tab-panel="create" role="tabpanel">
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__cat">Charts &amp; Trends</div>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__grid">
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="chart" aria-label="Add Chart widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 17l5-6 4 4 5-8 4 6"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Chart</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="gauge" aria-label="Add Gauge widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 18a8 8 0 1 1 16 0"/><path d="m12 14 4-4"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Gauge</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="value" aria-label="Add Value widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 7h14M5 12h9M5 17h6"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Value</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="pie" aria-label="Add Pie widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M12 3a9 9 0 1 0 9 9h-9Z"/><path d="M12 3v9h9"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Pie</span>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__cat">Tables &amp; Lists</div>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__grid">
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="grid" aria-label="Add Grid widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M3 14h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Grid</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="toplist" aria-label="Add Top List widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 6h10M4 12h7M4 18h13"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Top List</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="heatmap" aria-label="Add Heatmap widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"><rect x="3" y="3" width="6" height="6"/><rect x="10" y="3" width="6" height="6"/><rect x="3" y="10" width="6" height="6"/><rect x="10" y="10" width="6" height="6"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Heatmap</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card" data-name="sankey" disabled aria-label="Sankey widget unavailable for this source">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><path d="M3 5h3v6H3zM3 13h3v6H3zM18 7h3v4h-3zM18 14h3v4h-3z"/><path d="M6 8c6 0 6-1 12 1M6 16c6 0 6 0 12-1" stroke-width="1.4"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Sankey</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- predefined (hidden until its tab is selected) -->
    <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__tabpanel" data-tab-panel="predefined" role="tabpanel" hidden>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__cat">Predefined Widgets</div>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__grid oo-add-widget-panel__grid--lib">
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" data-name="service health overview" aria-label="Add Service Health Overview, a Grid widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M3 14h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Service Health Overview</span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Grid</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" data-name="noc wallboard cpu" aria-label="Add NOC Wallboard CPU, a Gauge widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 18a8 8 0 1 1 16 0"/><path d="m12 14 4-4"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">NOC Wallboard CPU</span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Gauge</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" data-name="firewall wan link" aria-label="Add Firewall WAN Link, a Chart widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 17l5-6 4 4 5-8 4 6"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Firewall WAN Link</span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Chart</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- user define (empty state) -->
    <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__tabpanel" data-tab-panel="userdefine" role="tabpanel" hidden>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__empty">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 10h18M9 4v16"/></svg>
        <strong>No user-defined widgets yet</strong>
        <span>Create a widget and save it to reuse it here.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- variant: predefined active — statically shows the 3-column library grid -->
<section class="oo-add-widget-panel" role="dialog" aria-label="Add new widget">
  <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__head">
    <span class="oo-add-widget-panel__title">Add New Widget</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-add-widget-panel__x" aria-label="Close add widget panel">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true"><line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-aw-tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Widget source">
    <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="create" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">Create Widget</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab on" role="tab" data-tab="predefined" aria-selected="true" tabindex="0">Predefined</button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-aw-tab" role="tab" data-tab="userdefine" aria-selected="false" tabindex="-1">User Define</button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__search">
    <div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search widgets" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__body">
    <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__tabpanel" data-tab-panel="predefined" role="tabpanel">
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__cat">Predefined Widgets</div>
      <div class="oo-add-widget-panel__grid oo-add-widget-panel__grid--lib">
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" data-name="cluster health" aria-label="Add Cluster Health, a Grid widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M3 14h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Cluster Health</span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Grid</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" data-name="custom query value" aria-label="Add Custom Query Value, a Value widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M5 7h14M5 12h9M5 17h6"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Custom Query Value</span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Value</span>
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-template-card oo-template-card--lib" data-name="latency overview" aria-label="Add Latency Overview, a Chart widget">
          <span class="oo-template-card__ic" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 17l5-6 4 4 5-8 4 6"/></svg></span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__name">Latency Overview</span>
          <span class="oo-template-card__sub">Chart</span>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
AI Copilot Drawer planes/ai-copilot-drawer

AI Copilot

ObserveOps AIOps · build 8.2.5
Live analysis · 5 findings · 1 critical
Anomaly Confidence 94%
Disk usage anomaly on DATASTORE-01
Current-partition usage is 80.9% — 3.1σ above the 14-day learned baseline. Sustained climb began ~46m ago.
Forecast Confidence 82%
sql-primary will breach session limit
Active sessions are projected to cross 350 in ~3h 10m at the current rate. Consider scaling the connection pool.

Hi 👋 I’m your ObserveOps AI Copilot. Ask about anomalies, forecasts, or root cause — or tap a suggestion below.

Why is DATASTORE-01 disk high?

AI Copilot

ObserveOps AIOps · build 8.2.5
insightsaskdrawer

Right-edge AI Copilot drawer for the Dashboard module. A gradient-mark header sits over an Insights / Ask AI tab strip; the Insights tab shows a pulsing live-analysis note and a scrollable column of composed insight-card tiles, while the Ask AI tab shows a scrollable chat-message thread over a footer of suggestion-chip prompts and a chat-input composer. This component owns only the drawer chrome, tab regions and composition slots; the tiles, bubbles, chips and composer keep their own components (deps). Tabs are real buttons driven by aria-selected and [hidden] tabpanels; the close button and tabs carry hover, focus-visible and disabled states, and a `--drawer` modifier makes the chrome a fixed slide-in.

used in: dashboard-module · ai-copilot-flow · ai-insights-panel
<!-- AI Copilot drawer. The drawer chrome is owned by this component; the insight
     tiles, chips, chat bubbles and composer are composed atoms (oo-insight-card,
     oo-suggestion-chip, oo-chat-message, oo-chat-input — see deps). Tabs toggle
     aria-selected + the [hidden] tabpanels (driven by ai-copilot-drawer.js). -->

<!-- variant: insights (default — Insights tab active, populated) -->
<aside class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer" aria-label="AI Copilot">
  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__head">
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__mark" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" focusable="false">
        <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z"/>
        <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__titles">
      <h2 class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__title">AI Copilot</h2>
      <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__sub">ObserveOps AIOps · build 8.2.5</div>
    </div>
    <button type="button" class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__x" aria-label="Close AI Copilot">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Copilot view">
    <button type="button" class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="true" aria-controls="oo-aix-insights" data-oo-tab="insights">
      Insights <span class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__count">5</span>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" aria-controls="oo-aix-ask" data-oo-tab="ask">
      Ask AI
    </button>
  </div>

  <!-- Insights tabpanel -->
  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__body" id="oo-aix-insights" role="tabpanel" data-oo-panel="insights">
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__note">Live analysis · 5 findings · 1 critical</div>

    <!-- composed: oo-insight-card (crit) -->
    <article class="oo-insight-card oo-insight-card--crit" aria-label="Critical AI insight">
      <div class="oo-insight-card__top">
        <span class="oo-insight-card__kind">Anomaly</span>
        <span class="oo-insight-card__conf">Confidence <b>94%</b></span>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-insight-card__title">Disk usage anomaly on DATASTORE-01</div>
      <div class="oo-insight-card__desc">Current-partition usage is <b>80.9%</b> — 3.1&sigma; above the 14-day learned baseline. Sustained climb began ~46m ago.</div>
      <svg class="oo-insight-card__spark" viewBox="0 0 320 30" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 23 L29 21 L58 24 L87 19 L116 21 L145 16 L174 18 L203 12 L232 14 L261 7 L290 4 L320 2 L320 30 L0 30 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".13"/>
        <path d="M0 23 L29 21 L58 24 L87 19 L116 21 L145 16 L174 18 L203 12 L232 14 L261 7 L290 4 L320 2" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="oo-insight-card__acts">
        <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
          Add as widget
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn">Investigate</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn ghost" data-oo-dismiss aria-label="Dismiss insight">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </article>

    <!-- composed: oo-insight-card (warn) -->
    <article class="oo-insight-card oo-insight-card--warn" aria-label="Warning AI insight">
      <div class="oo-insight-card__top">
        <span class="oo-insight-card__kind">Forecast</span>
        <span class="oo-insight-card__conf">Confidence <b>82%</b></span>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-insight-card__title">sql-primary will breach session limit</div>
      <div class="oo-insight-card__desc">Active sessions are projected to cross <b>350</b> in ~<b>3h 10m</b> at the current rate. Consider scaling the connection pool.</div>
      <svg class="oo-insight-card__spark" viewBox="0 0 320 30" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 25 L29 22 L58 23 L87 20 L116 21 L145 17 L174 18 L203 14 L232 15 L261 11 L290 9 L320 6 L320 30 L0 30 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".13"/>
        <path d="M0 25 L29 22 L58 23 L87 20 L116 21 L145 17 L174 18 L203 14 L232 15 L261 11 L290 9 L320 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="oo-insight-card__acts">
        <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn primary">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
          Add as widget
        </button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn">Investigate</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-insight-btn ghost" data-oo-dismiss aria-label="Dismiss insight">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>

  <!-- Ask AI tabpanel (hidden until selected) -->
  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__ask" id="oo-aix-ask" role="tabpanel" data-oo-panel="ask" hidden>
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__chat" role="log" aria-label="Copilot conversation">
      <!-- composed: oo-chat-message (ai) -->
      <div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--ai" tabindex="0" aria-label="Copilot said">
        <div class="oo-chat-message__avatar" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" focusable="false">
            <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z"/>
            <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-chat-message__bubble">
          <p>Hi 👋 I’m your ObserveOps AI Copilot. Ask about anomalies, forecasts, or root cause — or tap a suggestion below.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- composed: oo-chat-message (user) -->
      <div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--user" tabindex="0" aria-label="You said">
        Why is DATASTORE-01 disk high?
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__foot">
      <!-- composed: oo-suggestion-chip row -->
      <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__chips">
