        <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip">Summarize dashboard health</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip">Forecast core-router-01 CPU</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip">Top 5 hosts by latency</button>
      </div>
      <!-- composed: oo-chat-input -->
      <div class="oo-chat-input">
        <input class="oo-chat-input__field" type="text" aria-label="Ask the AI copilot about your infrastructure" placeholder="Ask about your infrastructure…">
        <button type="button" class="oo-chat-input__send is-disabled" disabled aria-label="Send message">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 2 11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4z"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- variant: ask (Ask AI tab active) · state: disabled drawer -->
<aside class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer is-disabled" aria-label="AI Copilot" aria-disabled="true">
  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__head">
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__mark" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" focusable="false">
        <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z"/>
        <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__titles">
      <h2 class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__title">AI Copilot</h2>
      <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__sub">ObserveOps AIOps · build 8.2.5</div>
    </div>
    <button type="button" class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__x" aria-label="Close AI Copilot" disabled>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Copilot view">
    <button type="button" class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" data-oo-tab="insights">
      Insights <span class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__count">5</span>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="true" data-oo-tab="ask">
      Ask AI
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__ask" role="tabpanel" data-oo-panel="ask">
    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__chat" role="log" aria-label="Copilot conversation">
      <div class="oo-chat-message oo-chat-message--ai" aria-label="Copilot is typing" aria-live="polite">
        <div class="oo-chat-message__avatar" aria-hidden="true">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" focusable="false">
            <path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z"/>
            <path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z"/>
          </svg>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-chat-message__bubble">
          <div class="oo-chat-message__typing" role="status" aria-label="Copilot is thinking">
            <span></span><span></span><span></span>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__foot">
      <div class="oo-ai-copilot-drawer__chips">
        <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip" disabled>Summarize dashboard health</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-suggestion-chip" disabled>Top 5 hosts by latency</button>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-chat-input is-disabled" aria-disabled="true">
        <input class="oo-chat-input__field" type="text" aria-label="Ask the AI copilot about your infrastructure" placeholder="Ask about your infrastructure…" disabled>
        <button type="button" class="oo-chat-input__send is-disabled" disabled aria-label="Send message">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 2 11 13M22 2l-7 20-4-9-9-4z"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</aside>
Alert Banner planes/alert-banner
Warning Motadata DATASTORE server 172.16.14.71 is experiencing high Disk Usage in Current Partition with value 80.9 above the 80 threshold
Critical 3 services on app-prod-02 are down — error rate spiked to 14.2% over the last 5 minutes
Info Scheduled maintenance window opens at 02:00 UTC — 2 collectors will restart automatically
Warning License expires in 6 days — renew to avoid interrupted data collection
warningcriticalinfo

Top-of-shell warning banner above the topbar: a severity chip (icon + uppercase label), a muted message with bold-emphasised counts and entity names, and a dismiss button at the far right. Selectable severity tone (warning, critical, info), a non-dismissable disabled state, and a collapse-on-dismiss transition driven by the chrome's alert source.

used in: dashboard-shell · alert-notification · topbar-region
<!-- variant: warning (default tone) -->
<div class="oo-alert-banner" role="alert">
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__chip">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M10.3 3.8 1.8 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.7 3h17a2 2 0 0 0 1.7-3L13.7 3.8a2 2 0 0 0-3.4 0Z"/>
      <line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="13"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12.01" y2="17"/>
    </svg>
    Warning
  </span>
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__text">Motadata <strong>DATASTORE</strong> server <strong>172.16.14.71</strong> is experiencing high Disk Usage in Current Partition with value <strong>80.9</strong> above the 80 threshold</span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-alert-banner__x" aria-label="Dismiss alert">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: critical -->
<div class="oo-alert-banner is-critical" role="alert">
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__chip">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"/><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"/>
    </svg>
    Critical
  </span>
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__text"><strong>3</strong> services on <strong>app-prod-02</strong> are down — error rate spiked to <strong>14.2%</strong> over the last 5 minutes</span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-alert-banner__x" aria-label="Dismiss alert">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: info -->
<div class="oo-alert-banner is-info" role="status">
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__chip">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><line x1="12" y1="11" x2="12" y2="16"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12.01" y2="8"/>
    </svg>
    Info
  </span>
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__text">Scheduled maintenance window opens at <strong>02:00 UTC</strong> — <strong>2</strong> collectors will restart automatically</span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-alert-banner__x" aria-label="Dismiss alert">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled dismiss (non-dismissable / persistent banner) -->
<div class="oo-alert-banner" role="alert">
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__chip">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <path d="M10.3 3.8 1.8 18a2 2 0 0 0 1.7 3h17a2 2 0 0 0 1.7-3L13.7 3.8a2 2 0 0 0-3.4 0Z"/>
      <line x1="12" y1="9" x2="12" y2="13"/><line x1="12" y1="17" x2="12.01" y2="17"/>
    </svg>
    Warning
  </span>
  <span class="oo-alert-banner__text">License expires in <strong>6 days</strong> — renew to avoid interrupted data collection</span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-alert-banner__x" aria-label="Dismiss alert" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>
Dashboard Canvas planes/canvas
13:27 18:07 22:47 03:27 08:07 12:47 17:27 22:07
CPU Utilization Trend Chart
Active Alerts Grid
00:00 04:00 08:00 12:00 16:00 20:00
Traffic Streamgraph Stream
13:27 18:07 22:47 03:27 08:07 12:47
No widgets yet — add one to get started.
defaultwith-wide-widgetempty

The dashboard's main editing plane: a flex column stacking a time ruler (tick scale + range slider) over a scrollable 2-column widget grid, with a floating 'Add widget' FAB pinned bottom-right. It is the composition surface for the canvas — ruler + widget-card(s) + fab — and ships lightweight placeholder widget cards so it previews in isolation without the live widget renderer. Cards support a wide modifier spanning both columns; includes an empty state, hover/focus-visible affordances on the tool buttons and FAB, and a disabled/locked treatment.

used in: dashboard-module
<!-- variant: default · ruler + 2-column widget grid (2 placeholder cards) + FAB -->
<section class="oo-canvas" role="region" aria-label="Dashboard canvas">
  <div class="oo-canvas__ruler" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-canvas__ticks">
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">13:27</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">18:07</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">22:47</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">03:27</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">08:07</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">12:47</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">17:27</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">22:07</span>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-canvas__slider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-canvas__grid" role="list" aria-label="Widgets">
    <!-- placeholder widget card · composes widget-card -->
    <article class="oo-canvas__card" role="listitem">
      <header class="oo-canvas__card-head">
        <span class="oo-canvas__card-title">CPU Utilization Trend</span>
        <span class="oo-canvas__card-tag">Chart</span>
        <div class="oo-canvas__card-tools">
          <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__card-tool" aria-label="Refresh widget">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7L21 8"/><path d="M21 3v5h-5"/></svg>
          </button>
          <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__card-tool" aria-label="More options">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.6"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.6"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.6"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>
      <div class="oo-canvas__card-body">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 40" fill="none" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="0,30 14,22 28,26 42,12 56,18 70,8 84,16 100,6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
      </div>
    </article>

    <!-- placeholder widget card · composes widget-card -->
    <article class="oo-canvas__card" role="listitem">
      <header class="oo-canvas__card-head">
        <span class="oo-canvas__card-title">Active Alerts</span>
        <span class="oo-canvas__card-tag">Grid</span>
        <div class="oo-canvas__card-tools">
          <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__card-tool" aria-label="Refresh widget">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-3-6.7L21 8"/><path d="M21 3v5h-5"/></svg>
          </button>
          <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__card-tool" aria-label="More options">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.6"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.6"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.6"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>
      <div class="oo-canvas__card-body">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 40" fill="currentColor" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="2" y="24" width="14" height="14" rx="1.5"/><rect x="22" y="14" width="14" height="24" rx="1.5"/><rect x="42" y="20" width="14" height="18" rx="1.5"/><rect x="62" y="8" width="14" height="30" rx="1.5"/><rect x="82" y="18" width="14" height="20" rx="1.5"/></svg>
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>

  <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__fab" aria-label="Add new widget">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  </button>
</section>

<!-- variant: with-wide-widget · a card spanning both grid columns -->
<section class="oo-canvas" role="region" aria-label="Dashboard canvas with wide widget">
  <div class="oo-canvas__ruler" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-canvas__ticks">
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">00:00</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">04:00</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">08:00</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">12:00</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">16:00</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">20:00</span>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-canvas__slider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-canvas__grid" role="list" aria-label="Widgets">
    <!-- placeholder widget card · wide -->
    <article class="oo-canvas__card oo-canvas__card--wide" role="listitem">
      <header class="oo-canvas__card-head">
        <span class="oo-canvas__card-title">Traffic Streamgraph</span>
        <span class="oo-canvas__card-tag">Stream</span>
        <div class="oo-canvas__card-tools">
          <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__card-tool" aria-label="More options">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.6"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.6"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.6"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>
      <div class="oo-canvas__card-body">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 100 40" fill="none" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true"><polyline points="0,24 12,20 24,28 36,14 48,22 60,10 72,18 84,8 100,14" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
      </div>
    </article>
  </div>

  <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__fab" aria-label="Add new widget">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  </button>
</section>

<!-- variant: empty · no widgets placed yet, FAB shown disabled while loading -->
<section class="oo-canvas" role="region" aria-label="Empty dashboard canvas">
  <div class="oo-canvas__ruler" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-canvas__ticks">
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">13:27</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">18:07</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">22:47</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">03:27</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">08:07</span>
      <span class="oo-canvas__tick">12:47</span>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-canvas__slider" aria-hidden="true"></div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-canvas__empty">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><path d="M17.5 14.5v6M14.5 17.5h6"/></svg>
    <span>No widgets yet — add one to get started.</span>
  </div>

  <button type="button" class="oo-canvas__fab" aria-label="Add new widget" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
  </button>
</section>
Counter / Metric Picker planes/counter-picker
System
Network

system.memory.free.percent

Description

Percentage of physical memory currently free and available for allocation.

Interpretation

High Values: High free memory means plenty of headroom.

Low Values: Low free memory can lead to swapping and degraded performance.

RCA

When low, correlate with related counters, recent config changes, and active alerts on the same source.

Select a counter to see its description and interpretation.
defaultemptyfloating

Two-column metric-counter picker popup. A left rail composes a sticky search field over a scrollable list of selectable counter rows; the right pane is a metric-detail card showing the chosen counter's name, description, high/low interpretation and RCA guidance. Refined from the monolith .pop.wide / .cp-list / .cp-detail: rows are real <button>s with hover, focus-visible, selected (aria-pressed) and disabled states, and the floating-popover chrome is opt-in via the --floating modifier so it also renders as a self-contained card. Clicking a row single-selects it; typing filters the list. Shows an empty placeholder when nothing is selected.

used in: create-widget-modal · data-source-config · add-widget-flow
<!-- variant: default — search + selectable counter list (left) with a populated metric-detail card (right) -->
<div class="oo-counter-picker" role="dialog" aria-label="Select counter">
  <div class="oo-counter-picker__list">
    <!-- search-input atom -->
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__search">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="text" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search counters">
    </div>
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__scroll" role="group" aria-label="Counters">
      <div class="oo-counter-picker__group">System</div>
      <!-- menu-item: counter row -->
      <button type="button" class="oo-counter-picker__opt" aria-pressed="false" data-label="system.cpu.percent">
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-label">system.cpu.percent</span>
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-glyph" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
      </button>
      <!-- state: selected -->
      <button type="button" class="oo-counter-picker__opt is-on" aria-pressed="true" data-label="system.memory.free.percent">
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-label">system.memory.free.percent</span>
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-glyph" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-counter-picker__group">Network</div>
      <button type="button" class="oo-counter-picker__opt" aria-pressed="false" data-label="network.service.latency.ms">
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-label">network.service.latency.ms</span>
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-glyph" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
      </button>
      <!-- state: disabled -->
      <button type="button" class="oo-counter-picker__opt is-disabled" aria-pressed="false" aria-disabled="true" disabled data-label="apm.transaction.response.time.ms">
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-label">apm.transaction.response.time.ms</span>
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-glyph" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <!-- metric-detail-card -->
  <div class="oo-counter-picker__detail">
    <h4>system.memory.free.percent</h4>
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__dl">Description</div>
    <p>Percentage of physical memory currently free and available for allocation.</p>
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__dl">Interpretation</div>
    <p><b>High Values:</b> High free memory means plenty of headroom.</p>
    <p><b>Low Values:</b> Low free memory can lead to swapping and degraded performance.</p>
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__dl">RCA</div>
    <p>When low, correlate with related counters, recent config changes, and active alerts on the same source.</p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: empty — nothing selected yet, detail pane shows a placeholder -->
<div class="oo-counter-picker" role="dialog" aria-label="Select counter">
  <div class="oo-counter-picker__list">
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__search">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="text" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search counters">
    </div>
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__scroll" role="group" aria-label="Counters">
      <button type="button" class="oo-counter-picker__opt" aria-pressed="false" data-label="system.cpu.percent">
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-label">system.cpu.percent</span>
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-glyph" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-counter-picker__opt" aria-pressed="false" data-label="system.directory.files">
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-label">system.directory.files</span>
        <span class="oo-counter-picker__opt-glyph" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="16" rx="2"/><path d="M3 9h18M9 4v16"/></svg></span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-counter-picker__detail">
    <div class="oo-counter-picker__empty">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="m7 14 3-4 3 3 4-6"/></svg>
      <span>Select a counter to see its description and interpretation.</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
Create Widget Modal planes/create-widget-modal

Create Widget

today Today 26-06-10 00:00:00
26-06-10 11:40:36
Rotation
⟳ 0
Legend
Line Width
2
Points
Granularity *
Minute
Metric Grid
Order
Count
Type
Select
Threshold
Color
Select
Use Custom Sticky Timeline

When enabled, this widget keeps its own time range independent of the dashboard's global timeline.

Metric
Counter *
system.cpu.percent
Aggregation *
Avg
Source Filter
Everywhere
Source
Select source
Result By
Select
Filters
createeditoverlaystyle-panesorting-panemarkers-panetimeline-pane

The full Create Widget plane — the dashboard's largest surface. A flex-column panel stacking a header (title, time-range pill + date stamp, close), a scrollable widget-type tab strip (Chart, Grid, Top N, Gauge, Heat Map, Anomaly, AI Insights, …), a mid row of live preview pane and a config column with Style / Sorting / Markers / Timeline sub-tabs (chart style chooser, rotation & line-width sliders, legend / points / grid toggles, granularity select, order pills), the data-source builder (vertical colour-coded source tabs, a counter row of Counter / Aggregation / Source Filter / Source / Result By controls with a Σ math button and add/remove, a Filters bar, and source-category chips), and a footer action bar (Reset / Create Widget / Create & Add Widget). Every atom is namespaced under .oo-cwm so toggles, sliders, the style chooser and data-source rows can also render standalone. Default renders in-flow for the gallery; .oo-cwm--overlay + .is-open gives the production fixed-overlay scale-in.

used in: dashboard-module · add-widget-panel · dashboard-grid
<!-- variant: create (full plane — Style pane active) -->
<section class="oo-cwm" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Create Widget">

  <!-- header -->
  <header class="oo-cwm__head">
    <h2 class="oo-cwm__title">Create Widget</h2>
    <div class="oo-cwm__head-right">
      <span class="oo-cwm__range">
        <span class="oo-cwm__range-tag">today</span>
        <span class="oo-cwm__range-lbl">Today</span>
      </span>
      <span class="oo-cwm__date">26-06-10 00:00:00<br>26-06-10 11:40:36</span>
      <button class="oo-cwm__close" type="button" aria-label="Close">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- widget-type tab strip -->
  <div class="oo-cwm__types" role="tablist" aria-label="Widget type">
    <button class="oo-cwm__type is-on" role="tab" aria-selected="true">Chart</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__type" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Grid</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__type" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Top N</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__type" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Gauge</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__type" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Heat Map</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__type" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Anomaly</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__type" role="tab" aria-selected="false">AI Insights</button>
  </div>

  <!-- mid row: preview | config -->
  <div class="oo-cwm__mid">
    <!-- live preview pane -->
    <div class="oo-cwm__preview">
      <div class="oo-cwm__preview-wrap">
        <svg class="oo-cwm__preview-svg" viewBox="0 0 320 150" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
          <path d="M0,110 40,90 80,100 120,60 160,75 200,50 240,65 280,40 320,55 320,150 0,150 Z" fill="var(--teal2)"/>
          <path d="M0,110 40,90 80,100 120,60 160,75 200,50 240,65 280,40 320,55" fill="none" stroke="var(--teal)" stroke-width="2"/>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- config -->
    <div class="oo-cwm__cfg">
      <div class="oo-cwm__names">
        <label class="oo-cwm__fld">
          <span class="oo-cwm__fld-label">Widget Name</span>
          <input class="oo-cwm__inp" type="text" placeholder="Enter widget name">
        </label>
        <label class="oo-cwm__fld">
          <span class="oo-cwm__fld-label">Widget Description</span>
          <input class="oo-cwm__inp" type="text" placeholder="Enter description">
        </label>
      </div>

      <div class="oo-cwm__subtabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Widget settings">
        <button class="oo-cwm__subtab is-on" role="tab" aria-selected="true" data-target="style">Style</button>
        <button class="oo-cwm__subtab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" data-target="sorting">Sorting</button>
        <button class="oo-cwm__subtab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" data-target="markers">Markers</button>
        <button class="oo-cwm__subtab" role="tab" aria-selected="false" data-target="timeline">Timeline Preference</button>
      </div>

      <!-- STYLE pane -->
      <div class="oo-cwm__pane is-on" role="tabpanel" data-pane="style">
        <div class="oo-cwm__style-row" role="group" aria-label="Chart style">
          <button class="oo-cwm__style-btn is-on" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Area">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 14 6 9 10 11 14 5 18 8 22 6 22 16 2 16 Z" fill="currentColor" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" opacity=".85"/></svg>
          </button>
          <button class="oo-cwm__style-btn" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Line">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M2 14 6 9 10 11 14 5 18 8 22 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
          </button>
          <button class="oo-cwm__style-btn" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Horizontal bar">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="3" width="14" height="3" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="3" y="8" width="9" height="3" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="17" height="3" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
          </button>
          <button class="oo-cwm__style-btn" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Column">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 18" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="8" width="3.5" height="8" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="9" y="4" width="3.5" height="12" fill="currentColor"/><rect x="15" y="10" width="3.5" height="6" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-grid">
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Rotation</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__slider">
              <span class="oo-cwm__slider-ic" aria-hidden="true">&#10227;</span>
              <input class="oo-cwm__range-input" type="range" min="0" max="360" value="0" aria-label="Rotation">
              <span class="oo-cwm__sv">0</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Legend</span>
            <button class="oo-cwm__toggle" type="button" role="switch" aria-checked="false" aria-label="Legend">
              <span class="oo-cwm__tk"></span><span class="oo-cwm__tt">OFF</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Line Width</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__slider">
              <input class="oo-cwm__range-input" type="range" min="1" max="8" value="2" aria-label="Line width">
              <span class="oo-cwm__sv">2</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Points</span>
            <button class="oo-cwm__toggle is-on" type="button" role="switch" aria-checked="true" aria-label="Points">
              <span class="oo-cwm__tk"></span><span class="oo-cwm__tt">ON</span>
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Granularity <span class="oo-cwm__req">*</span></span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__field-row">
              <input class="oo-cwm__num" type="text" value="5" style="width:60px">
              <div class="oo-cwm__sel" role="button" tabindex="0" style="flex:1">
                <span class="oo-cwm__v">Minute</span>
                <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Metric Grid</span>
            <button class="oo-cwm__toggle" type="button" role="switch" aria-checked="false" aria-label="Metric grid">
              <span class="oo-cwm__tk"></span><span class="oo-cwm__tt">OFF</span>
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- SORTING pane -->
      <div class="oo-cwm__pane" role="tabpanel" data-pane="sorting">
        <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item" style="margin-bottom:18px">
          <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Order</span>
          <div class="oo-cwm__pills" role="radiogroup" aria-label="Order">
            <button class="oo-cwm__pill is-on" role="radio" aria-checked="true">Top</button>
            <button class="oo-cwm__pill" role="radio" aria-checked="false">Last</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
          <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Count</span>
          <input class="oo-cwm__num" type="text" value="10">
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- MARKERS pane -->
      <div class="oo-cwm__pane" role="tabpanel" data-pane="markers">
        <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-grid" style="grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr">
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Type</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__sel" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v is-ph">Select</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Threshold</span>
            <input class="oo-cwm__num" type="text" value="0.00" style="width:100%">
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
            <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Color</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__sel" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v is-ph">Select</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- TIMELINE pane -->
      <div class="oo-cwm__pane" role="tabpanel" data-pane="timeline">
        <div class="oo-cwm__cfg-item">
          <span class="oo-cwm__clbl">Use Custom Sticky Timeline</span>
          <button class="oo-cwm__toggle" type="button" role="switch" aria-checked="false" aria-label="Use custom sticky timeline">
            <span class="oo-cwm__tk"></span><span class="oo-cwm__tt">OFF</span>
          </button>
        </div>
        <p class="oo-cwm__hint">When enabled, this widget keeps its own time range independent of the dashboard's global timeline.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- data-source builder -->
  <div class="oo-cwm__ds">
    <div class="oo-cwm__ds-sec">
      <div class="oo-cwm__ds-tab oo-cwm__ds-tab--metric">Metric</div>
      <div class="oo-cwm__ds-body">
        <div class="oo-cwm__ds-row">
          <div class="oo-cwm__ds-fld">
            <span class="oo-cwm__ds-label">Counter <span class="oo-cwm__req">*</span></span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__ds-ctrl" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v">system.cpu.percent</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__ds-fld">
            <span class="oo-cwm__ds-label">Aggregation <span class="oo-cwm__req">*</span></span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__ds-ctrl" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v">Avg</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__ds-fld">
            <span class="oo-cwm__ds-label">Source Filter</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__ds-ctrl" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v">Everywhere</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__ds-fld">
            <span class="oo-cwm__ds-label">Source</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__ds-ctrl" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v is-ph">Select source</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="oo-cwm__ds-fld">
            <span class="oo-cwm__ds-label">Result By</span>
            <div class="oo-cwm__ds-ctrl" role="button" tabindex="0">
              <span class="oo-cwm__v is-ph">Select</span>
              <span class="oo-cwm__cv"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg></span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <button class="oo-cwm__ds-sigma" type="button" title="Math expression" aria-label="Math expression">&#931;</button>
          <button class="oo-cwm__ds-plus" type="button" title="Add counter" aria-label="Add counter">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-cwm__ds-filters" role="button" tabindex="0">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 3H2l8 9.5V19l4 2v-8.5z"/></svg>
          <span>Filters</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-cwm__ds-cats">
      <button class="oo-cwm__ds-cat is-on" type="button" aria-pressed="true">Metric</button>
      <button class="oo-cwm__ds-cat" type="button" aria-pressed="false">RUM</button>
      <button class="oo-cwm__ds-cat" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Log</button>
      <button class="oo-cwm__ds-cat" type="button" aria-pressed="false">APM</button>
      <button class="oo-cwm__ds-cat" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Flow</button>
      <button class="oo-cwm__ds-cat" type="button" aria-pressed="false">Alert</button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- footer -->
  <footer class="oo-cwm__foot">
    <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--ghost" type="button">Reset</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--outline" type="button">Create Widget</button>
    <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--solid" type="button">Create &amp; Add Widget</button>
  </footer>
</section>

<!-- variant: footer-actions (button styles + disabled state) -->
<footer class="oo-cwm__foot" style="border-top:0">
  <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--ghost" type="button">Reset</button>
  <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--outline" type="button">Create Widget</button>
  <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--solid" type="button">Create &amp; Add Widget</button>
  <!-- state: disabled -->
  <button class="oo-cwm__btn oo-cwm__btn--solid" type="button" disabled>Create &amp; Add Widget</button>
</footer>
Dashboard List Panel planes/dashboard-panel
8.2.2
Alert Summary
firewall wan link
dashboard-tabnoc-tab

Slide-in left dashboard-list panel for the Dashboard module shell, shown in its open state. Composes a segmented Dashboard / NOC tab control, an add-widget circle button, a search field and a scrollable two-level dashboard tree (category node with count -> dashboard leaf with lock icon and favourite star). Tabs, category rows, leaves and stars are real controls with hover, focus-visible and disabled states; selection, expand/collapse and favourite toggling are driven by ARIA attributes.

used in: dashboard-shell · dashboard-module · noc-view
<!-- variant: dashboard tab active — favourites expanded, one dashboard selected -->
<aside class="oo-dashboard-panel" aria-label="Dashboards">
  <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__head">
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard view">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="true">Dashboard</button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false">NOC View</button>
    </div>
    <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__add" aria-label="Add new widget">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__search">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
    <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search dashboards" />
  </div>

  <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__tree" role="tree" aria-label="Dashboard list">
    <!-- expanded category node -->
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__node">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__row" aria-expanded="true">
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__caret"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg></span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__label">My Favorite</span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__count">7</span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__children" role="group">
        <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__leaf" role="treeitem" tabindex="0" aria-selected="false">
          <svg class="oo-dashboard-panel__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
          <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__leaf-label">8.2.2</span>
          <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__star" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Remove 8.2.2 from favourites">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__leaf" role="treeitem" tabindex="0" aria-selected="true">
          <svg class="oo-dashboard-panel__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
          <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__leaf-label">Alert Summary</span>
          <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__star" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Add Alert Summary to favourites">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
        <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__leaf" role="treeitem" tabindex="0" aria-selected="false">
          <svg class="oo-dashboard-panel__lock" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="5" y="11" width="14" height="9" rx="2"/><path d="M8 11V8a4 4 0 0 1 8 0v3"/></svg>
          <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__leaf-label">firewall wan link</span>
          <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__star" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Add firewall wan link to favourites">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- collapsed category nodes -->
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__node">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__row" aria-expanded="false">
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__caret"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg></span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__label">Overview</span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__count">4</span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__children" role="group"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__node">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__row" aria-expanded="false">
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__caret"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg></span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__label">Network</span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__count">10</span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__children" role="group"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__node">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__row" aria-expanded="false">
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__caret"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg></span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__label">Applications</span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__count">5</span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__children" role="group"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</aside>

<!-- variant: NOC tab active — favourites collapsed, add-widget disabled -->
<aside class="oo-dashboard-panel" aria-label="Dashboards">
  <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__head">
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__tabs" role="tablist" aria-label="Dashboard view">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="false">Dashboard</button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__tab" role="tab" aria-selected="true">NOC View</button>
    </div>
    <!-- state: disabled — add widget unavailable in NOC view -->
    <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__add" aria-label="Add new widget" disabled>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 5v14M5 12h14"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__search">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
    <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search NOC streams" />
  </div>

  <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__tree" role="tree" aria-label="NOC stream list">
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__node">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__row" aria-expanded="false">
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__caret"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg></span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__label">My Favorite</span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__count">7</span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__children" role="group"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__node">
      <button type="button" class="oo-dashboard-panel__row" aria-expanded="false">
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__caret"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m9 6 6 6-6 6"/></svg></span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__label">Server</span>
        <span class="oo-dashboard-panel__count">6</span>
      </button>
      <div class="oo-dashboard-panel__children" role="group"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</aside>
Brand Logo planes/logo
motadata
motadata
motadata motadata
defaultsmlgstackedmark-only

Motadata brand lockup — a conic-gradient circular mark (teal disc with a notch + punched-out center hole) beside the "motadata" wordmark, with "data" in the teal accent. Pure CSS, theme-recolorable; scales from a single --oo-logo-size knob.

used in: topbar · app-chrome
<!-- variant: default — topbar home lockup (27px mark) -->
<a class="oo-logo" href="#" aria-label="Motadata ObserveOps — home">
  <span class="oo-logo__mark" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-logo__word">mota<b>data</b></span>
</a>

<!-- variant: lg + stacked — auth / splash lockup -->
<div class="oo-logo oo-logo--lg oo-logo--stacked" role="img" aria-label="Motadata ObserveOps">
  <span class="oo-logo__mark" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-logo__word">mota<b>data</b></span>
</div>

<!-- variant: mark-only — collapsed nav rail (wordmark kept for screen readers) -->
<a class="oo-logo oo-logo--mark-only" href="#" aria-label="Motadata — home">
  <span class="oo-logo__mark" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-logo__word">mota<b>data</b></span>
</a>

<!-- state: disabled -->
<span class="oo-logo is-disabled" role="img" aria-label="Motadata (disabled)" aria-disabled="true">
  <span class="oo-logo__mark" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <span class="oo-logo__word">mota<b>data</b></span>
</span>
NOC Wallboard planes/noc-wallboard

80.9%

1240ms

DATASTORE-01Disk Usage 80.9% > 80 core-router-01CPU Load 94% sustained app-clusterResponse time 1240ms mq-brokerQueue depth 14.2k exceeds limit

Live
mq-broker
Queue Depth
14.2k
sql-primary

edge-fw-02
