mq-brokerQueue depth 14.2k exceeds limit edge-fw-02Agent offline 6m
defaultfiltered

Full-screen Network-Operations-Centre wallboard plane: a header (title + pulsing Live indicator + KPI status counters), a responsive 4-column grid of severity status tiles (stripe + pulsing dot, name, sublabel, big mono value, sparkline), and a scrolling Critical alert ticker. Composes the noc-kpi, noc-tile and ticker-item patterns inline so it renders fully self-contained. KPI counters double as single-select severity filters that dim non-matching tiles, and the ticker has a pause/play toggle.

used in: noc-view · dashboard-module · dashboard-panel-tab
<!-- variant: default — full NOC wallboard (live header · KPI counters · 4-col status grid · ticker) -->
<section class="oo-noc-wallboard" role="region" aria-label="NOC wallboard — stream">
  <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__top">
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__title">NOC View · <b>stream</b></div>
    <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__live">Live</span>

    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpis" role="group" aria-label="Monitor status summary">
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--neutral">
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">248</div>
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Monitors</div>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--critical">
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">3</div>
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Critical</div>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--warning">
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">3</div>
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Warning</div>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--up">
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">234</div>
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Up</div>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--down">
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">8</div>
        <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Down</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__grid">
    <!-- crit -->
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--crit">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">DATASTORE-01</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">Disk Usage · Partition /</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">80.9<span class="oo-noc-wallboard__unit">%</span></div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 20 L40 17 L80 19 L120 11 L160 13 L200 6 L240 4 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 20 L40 17 L80 19 L120 11 L160 13 L200 6 L240 4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <!-- crit (drill-down button) -->
    <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--crit" aria-label="core-router-01 — CPU Load 94 percent, critical. Open monitor.">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">core-router-01</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">CPU Load</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">94<span class="oo-noc-wallboard__unit">%</span></div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 16 L40 10 L80 14 L120 7 L160 9 L200 4 L240 5 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 16 L40 10 L80 14 L120 7 L160 9 L200 4 L240 5" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </button>

    <!-- warn -->
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--warn">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">app-cluster</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">Response Time</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">1240<span class="oo-noc-wallboard__unit">ms</span></div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 14 L40 16 L80 10 L120 13 L160 8 L200 12 L240 9 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 14 L40 16 L80 10 L120 13 L160 8 L200 12 L240 9" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <!-- ok -->
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--ok">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">web-frontend</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">Requests / sec</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">8.4<span class="oo-noc-wallboard__unit">k</span></div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 12 L40 9 L80 13 L120 8 L160 11 L200 7 L240 10 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 12 L40 9 L80 13 L120 8 L160 11 L200 7 L240 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker">
    <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-lbl">Critical</span>
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-track">
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-row">
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__tk"><b>DATASTORE-01</b>Disk Usage 80.9% &gt; 80</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__tk"><b>core-router-01</b>CPU Load 94% sustained</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__tk oo-noc-wallboard__tk--warn"><b>app-cluster</b>Response time 1240ms</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__tk"><b>mq-broker</b>Queue depth 14.2k exceeds limit</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-pause" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Pause alert ticker">
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__ico-pause" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="6" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/></svg>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__ico-play" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5l11 7-11 7z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- variant: filtered — KPI counters act as a single-select severity filter; "Critical" active dims non-matching tiles, ticker paused, one offline tile disabled -->
<section class="oo-noc-wallboard is-ticker-paused" role="region" aria-label="NOC wallboard — filtered by critical">
  <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__top">
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__title">NOC View · <b>prod-edge</b></div>
    <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__live">Live</span>

    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpis" role="group" aria-label="Filter wallboard by status">
      <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--critical" data-oo-noc-filter="crit" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Show critical monitors: 2">
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">2</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Critical</span>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--warning" data-oo-noc-filter="warn" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Show warning monitors: 1">
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">1</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Warning</span>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--up" data-oo-noc-filter="ok" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Show healthy monitors: 1">
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">1</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Up</span>
      </button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi oo-noc-wallboard__kpi--down" disabled aria-label="Down monitors: unavailable">
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-v">&mdash;</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__kpi-l">Down</span>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__grid">
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--crit" data-severity="crit">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">mq-broker</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">Queue Depth</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">14.2<span class="oo-noc-wallboard__unit">k</span></div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 18 L40 13 L80 15 L120 8 L160 6 L200 5 L240 3 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 18 L40 13 L80 15 L120 8 L160 6 L200 5 L240 3" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <!-- state: dimmed — excluded by the active "Critical" filter -->
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--warn is-dimmed" data-severity="warn">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">sql-primary</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">Active Sessions</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">312</div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 13 L40 15 L80 11 L120 14 L160 9 L200 12 L240 10 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 13 L40 15 L80 11 L120 14 L160 9 L200 12 L240 10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <!-- state: dimmed — excluded by the active "Critical" filter -->
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--ok is-dimmed" data-severity="ok">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">cache-redis</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">Hit Ratio</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">99.1<span class="oo-noc-wallboard__unit">%</span></div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 8 L40 6 L80 9 L120 5 L160 7 L200 4 L240 6 L240 26 L0 26 Z" fill="currentColor" opacity=".14"/>
        <path d="M0 8 L40 6 L80 9 L120 5 L160 7 L200 4 L240 6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
      </svg>
    </div>

    <!-- state: disabled — monitor offline / data stale -->
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__tile oo-noc-wallboard__tile--crit is-disabled" data-severity="crit" aria-disabled="true">
      <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__stat" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__name">edge-fw-02</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__sub">No data · agent offline</div>
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__value">--</div>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__spark" viewBox="0 0 240 26" preserveAspectRatio="none" aria-hidden="true">
        <path d="M0 13 L240 13" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker">
    <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-lbl">Critical</span>
    <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-track">
      <div class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-row">
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__tk"><b>mq-broker</b>Queue depth 14.2k exceeds limit</span>
        <span class="oo-noc-wallboard__tk"><b>edge-fw-02</b>Agent offline 6m</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <button type="button" class="oo-noc-wallboard__ticker-pause" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Resume alert ticker">
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__ico-pause" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="6" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/><rect x="14" y="5" width="4" height="14" rx="1"/></svg>
      <svg class="oo-noc-wallboard__ico-play" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 5l11 7-11 7z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>
</section>
Modal Overlay / Backdrop planes/overlay
Delete widget?
This removes CPU Utilisation from the dashboard. The scrim dims and blurs every plane behind it to pull focus to this decision.
Save changes
Apply your edits to Response Time before leaving fullscreen.
scrimstrongwith-dialogcontained

Full-bleed modal scrim that dims and blurs every plane behind a drawer or dialog. The semi-transparent dark-blue tone is derived from --bg via color-mix; a --strong modifier gives the deeper fullscreen scrim, --contained confines it to a positioned ancestor. Opens/closes with a single .is-open toggle (fade scrim + lift-in dialog), mirroring the live openAddWidget()/closeAddWidget() pattern, and dismisses on backdrop-click, ✕, or Escape. Ships a sample centred dialog box (header, body, footer) so the dimming reads, with hover / focus-visible / disabled states on its close and footer controls.

used in: add-widget-panel · create-widget-modal · ai-insights-drawer · widget-fullscreen
<!-- variant: with-dialog · interactive — trigger opens the scrim, backdrop/✕/Esc dismiss -->
<div class="oo-overlay-stage">
  <div class="oo-overlay-stage__behind" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="oo-overlay-stage__bar oo-overlay-stage__bar--wide"></div>
    <div class="oo-overlay-stage__bar"></div>
    <div class="oo-overlay-stage__grid">
      <div class="oo-overlay-stage__cell"></div>
      <div class="oo-overlay-stage__cell"></div>
      <div class="oo-overlay-stage__cell"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__trigger" data-oo-overlay-open
          aria-haspopup="dialog">Open dialog</button>

  <div class="oo-overlay oo-overlay--contained" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-overlay__box" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="oo-ov-title-1">
      <div class="oo-overlay__head">
        <span class="oo-overlay__title" id="oo-ov-title-1">Delete widget?</span>
        <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__x" data-oo-overlay-close aria-label="Close dialog">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12" />
          </svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-overlay__body">
        This removes <strong>CPU Utilisation</strong> from the dashboard. The scrim dims and blurs
        every plane behind it to pull focus to this decision.
      </div>
      <div class="oo-overlay__foot">
        <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__btn" data-oo-overlay-close>Cancel</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__btn oo-overlay__btn--primary">Delete</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: strong · heavier fullscreen scrim (widget-fullscreen), shown open -->
<div class="oo-overlay-stage">
  <div class="oo-overlay-stage__behind" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="oo-overlay-stage__bar oo-overlay-stage__bar--wide"></div>
    <div class="oo-overlay-stage__bar"></div>
    <div class="oo-overlay-stage__grid">
      <div class="oo-overlay-stage__cell"></div>
      <div class="oo-overlay-stage__cell"></div>
      <div class="oo-overlay-stage__cell"></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- state: open -->
  <div class="oo-overlay oo-overlay--contained oo-overlay--strong is-open" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-overlay__box" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="oo-ov-title-2">
      <div class="oo-overlay__head">
        <span class="oo-overlay__title" id="oo-ov-title-2">Save changes</span>
        <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__x" data-oo-overlay-close aria-label="Close dialog">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12" />
          </svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-overlay__body">
        Apply your edits to <strong>Response Time</strong> before leaving fullscreen.
      </div>
      <div class="oo-overlay__foot">
        <!-- state: disabled -->
        <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__btn" disabled>Discard</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-overlay__btn oo-overlay__btn--primary" data-oo-overlay-close>Save</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
Popup Menu planes/popup-menu
System
Network
staticfloatingendwith-searchwith-groups

Generic floating dropdown / context-menu surface: a rounded, shadowed panel that holds a list of options. Refined from the monolith's `.pop` popovers (the widget '···' more-menu, counter picker and source picker). It is the plane only — option rows are the composed menu-item atom (.oo-menu__item / .oo-menu__sep) — and adds an optional sticky search header, uppercase group labels, and a floating/anchored open-close behaviour. Base renders in flow (always-open surface); a --floating modifier plus a '···' trigger and -host wrapper drive a real anchored dropdown with outside-click / Esc dismissal.

used in: widget-more-menu · counter-picker · source-picker · ai-insights · context-menu
<!-- popup-menu · the floating surface; option rows are the composed menu-item atom (.oo-menu__item / .oo-menu__sep) -->

<!-- variant: static (open menu surface, shown in flow) -->
<div class="oo-popup-menu" role="menu" aria-label="Widget actions">
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7M18.5 2.5a2.1 2.1 0 0 1 3 3L12 16l-4 1 1-4z"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Edit</span>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 9h11v11H9zM5 15H4a1 1 0 0 1-1-1V4a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h10a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v1"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Clone</span>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3M16 3h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3M21 16v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Full Screen</span>
    <kbd class="oo-menu__shortcut">F</kbd>
  </button>
  <!-- composed: menu-item separator -->
  <div class="oo-menu__sep" role="separator"></div>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item oo-menu__item--danger" role="menuitem">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/></svg>
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Delete</span>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: floating · context-menu (interactive — "···" trigger toggles the anchored panel) -->
<div class="oo-popup-menu-host">
  <button type="button" class="oo-popup-menu__trigger" data-oo-popup-trigger
          aria-haspopup="menu" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Widget options">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.4"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.4"/></svg>
  </button>
  <div class="oo-popup-menu oo-popup-menu--floating oo-popup-menu--end" role="menu" aria-label="Widget options">
    <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M11 4H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v14a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h14a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-7M18.5 2.5a2.1 2.1 0 0 1 3 3L12 16l-4 1 1-4z"/></svg>
      <span class="oo-menu__label">Edit</span>
    </button>
    <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 3v12M8 11l4 4 4-4M4 17v2a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-2"/></svg>
      <span class="oo-menu__label">Export CSV</span>
    </button>
    <div class="oo-menu__sep" role="separator"></div>
    <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item oo-menu__item--danger" role="menuitem">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M3 6h18M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/></svg>
      <span class="oo-menu__label">Delete</span>
    </button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: with-search + with-groups (counter / source picker surface) -->
<div class="oo-popup-menu" role="menu" aria-label="Pick a counter">
  <div class="oo-popup-menu__search">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
    <input type="search" placeholder="Search" aria-label="Search counters" />
  </div>
  <div class="oo-popup-menu__group">System</div>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item is-active" role="menuitem" aria-current="true">
    <span class="oo-menu__label">CPU Utilisation</span>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Memory Used</span>
  </button>
  <div class="oo-popup-menu__group">Network</div>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem">
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Throughput</span>
  </button>
  <button type="button" class="oo-menu__item" role="menuitem" disabled aria-disabled="true">
    <span class="oo-menu__label">Packet Loss (no data)</span>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled (trigger cannot open the menu) -->
<div class="oo-popup-menu-host">
  <button type="button" class="oo-popup-menu__trigger" disabled aria-disabled="true"
          aria-haspopup="menu" aria-label="Widget options (unavailable)">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.4"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.4"/><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.4"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>
Timeline Ruler planes/ruler
13:27 18:07 22:47 03:27 08:07 12:47 17:27 22:07 02:48 07:28 11:40
00:00 04:00 08:00 12:00 16:00 20:00 now
13:27 18:07 22:47 03:27 08:07 12:47 17:27
defaultnow-marked

The slim canvas timeline header above the dashboard widget grid: a row of evenly-spaced mono time-tick labels on a dashed baseline, plus a draggable range indicator (the brush) that scrubs the visible time window. Drag the brush or focus it and use arrow / Home / End keys.

used in: dashboard-module · dashboard-canvas
<!-- variant: default — tick row + draggable range brush near the right edge -->
<div class="oo-ruler" role="group" aria-label="Timeline ruler">
  <div class="oo-ruler__ticks" aria-hidden="true">
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">13:27</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">18:07</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">22:47</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">03:27</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">08:07</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">12:47</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">17:27</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">22:07</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">02:48</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">07:28</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">11:40</span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-ruler__slider" role="slider" tabindex="0"
       aria-label="Visible time range" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" aria-valuenow="78">
    <span class="oo-ruler__handle" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: now-marked — the live "now" tick is highlighted in teal -->
<div class="oo-ruler" role="group" aria-label="Timeline ruler">
  <div class="oo-ruler__ticks" aria-hidden="true">
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">00:00</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">04:00</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">08:00</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">12:00</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">16:00</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">20:00</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick is-now">now</span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-ruler__slider" role="slider" tabindex="0" style="left:30%;width:30%"
       aria-label="Visible time range" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" aria-valuenow="42">
    <span class="oo-ruler__handle" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled — ruler is read-only, brush cannot be dragged -->
<div class="oo-ruler is-disabled" role="group" aria-label="Timeline ruler (locked)">
  <div class="oo-ruler__ticks" aria-hidden="true">
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">13:27</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">18:07</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">22:47</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">03:27</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">08:07</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">12:47</span>
    <span class="oo-ruler__tick">17:27</span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-ruler__slider is-disabled" role="slider" tabindex="-1" aria-disabled="true"
       aria-label="Visible time range" aria-valuemin="0" aria-valuemax="100" aria-valuenow="78">
    <span class="oo-ruler__handle" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  </div>
</div>
Application Shell Layout planes/shell-layout
alert-banner
topbar
subbar
dashboard-panel
canvas / content
alert-banner
topbar
subbar
dashboard-panel
canvas / content
topbar
subbar
canvas / content
defaultpanel-openno-banner

The root app shell: a flex column at full viewport height (alert-banner > topbar > subbar > body-row) whose body row pairs the icon sidebar, an optional slide-in dashboard panel, and the main content/canvas. Layout-only surface — each region is a labelled dashed slot placeholder that names the plane it frames, with per-region surface tints (--nav/--bg) hinting at the real chrome. Owns one behaviour: the dashboard-panel toggle, mirroring the live togglePanel() / .shell.panelopen interaction, with hover, focus-visible and disabled states.

used in: dashboard-module · noc-view
<!-- variant: default · banner + topbar + subbar + sidebar + content, panel collapsed -->
<div class="oo-shell-layout" role="group" aria-label="Application shell layout">
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__banner">
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">alert-banner</span>
  </div>
  <header class="oo-shell-layout__topbar">
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">topbar</span>
  </header>
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__subbar">
    <button type="button" class="oo-shell-layout__toggle" data-oo-shell-toggle
            aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Show dashboard panel">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
        <path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" />
      </svg>
    </button>
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">subbar</span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__body">
    <nav class="oo-shell-layout__sidebar" aria-label="Primary navigation">
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot oo-shell-layout__dot--active" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    </nav>
    <aside class="oo-shell-layout__panel" aria-label="Dashboard list" aria-hidden="true">
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">dashboard-panel</span>
    </aside>
    <main class="oo-shell-layout__content">
      <div class="oo-shell-layout__canvas">
        <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">canvas / content</span>
      </div>
    </main>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: panel-open · dashboard-panel docked, toggle in pressed/expanded state -->
<div class="oo-shell-layout oo-shell-layout--panel-open" role="group" aria-label="Application shell layout, dashboard panel open">
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__banner">
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">alert-banner</span>
  </div>
  <header class="oo-shell-layout__topbar">
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">topbar</span>
  </header>
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__subbar">
    <button type="button" class="oo-shell-layout__toggle" data-oo-shell-toggle
            aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Hide dashboard panel">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
        <path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" />
      </svg>
    </button>
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">subbar</span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__body">
    <nav class="oo-shell-layout__sidebar" aria-label="Primary navigation">
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot oo-shell-layout__dot--active" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    </nav>
    <aside class="oo-shell-layout__panel" aria-label="Dashboard list">
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">dashboard-panel</span>
    </aside>
    <main class="oo-shell-layout__content">
      <div class="oo-shell-layout__canvas">
        <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">canvas / content</span>
      </div>
    </main>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: no-banner · banner dismissed, shell starts at the topbar -->
<div class="oo-shell-layout" role="group" aria-label="Application shell layout without banner">
  <header class="oo-shell-layout__topbar">
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">topbar</span>
  </header>
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__subbar">
    <button type="button" class="oo-shell-layout__toggle" data-oo-shell-toggle
            aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Show dashboard panel">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
        <path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6" />
      </svg>
    </button>
    <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">subbar</span>
  </div>
  <div class="oo-shell-layout__body">
    <nav class="oo-shell-layout__sidebar" aria-label="Primary navigation">
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot oo-shell-layout__dot--active" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
      <span class="oo-shell-layout__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    </nav>
    <main class="oo-shell-layout__content">
      <div class="oo-shell-layout__canvas">
        <span class="oo-shell-layout__label">canvas / content</span>
      </div>
    </main>
  </div>
</div>
Sidebar Nav Rail planes/sidebar
full-railstate-showcasecompact-disabled

Left icon nav-rail — the shell's primary navigation plane. A 46px vertical column that composes sidebar-icon buttons with a flexible spacer that pins a trailing Settings action to the bottom; exactly one item is active at a time. Includes a section divider and a whole-rail disabled state.

used in: dashboard-shell · app-nav-rail · global-navigation
<!-- variant: full-rail — primary shell navigation (one item active, Settings pinned to bottom) -->
<nav class="oo-sidebar" role="navigation" aria-label="Primary">
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon is-active" type="button" aria-current="page" aria-label="Dashboards">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Monitors">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Alerts">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Reports">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6M9 13h6M9 17h6"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- divider groups the observability cluster from the data cluster -->
  <hr class="oo-sidebar__div" aria-hidden="true">
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Topology">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="5" cy="19" r="2.5"/><circle cx="19" cy="19" r="2.5"/><path d="M12 7.5 6 16.5M12 7.5l6 9"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Traces">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 12h4l3 8 4-16 3 8h4"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Analytics">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="m7 14 4-4 3 3 5-6"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Logs">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z"/><path d="M14 2v6h6"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- flexible spacer pushes the trailing action to the bottom -->
  <span class="oo-sidebar__sp" aria-hidden="true"></span>
  <!-- Settings is an action, not a destination: data-no-select keeps it out of single-select -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Settings" data-no-select>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 1 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 1 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33-1.82 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 1 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82.33H9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 1 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33 1.82V9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z"/></svg>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- variant: state-showcase — default · active · disabled item -->
<nav class="oo-sidebar" role="navigation" aria-label="States">
  <!-- state: default -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Monitors">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="4" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="13" width="18" height="5" rx="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- state: active (selected) -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon is-active" type="button" aria-current="page" aria-label="Topology">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="5" cy="19" r="2.5"/><circle cx="19" cy="19" r="2.5"/><path d="M12 7.5 6 16.5M12 7.5l6 9"/></svg>
  </button>
  <!-- state: disabled (unavailable destination) -->
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Traces (unavailable)" disabled aria-disabled="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 12h4l3 8 4-16 3 8h4"/></svg>
  </button>
</nav>

<!-- variant: compact-disabled (whole-rail disabled — nav locked while a modal is open) -->
<nav class="oo-sidebar is-disabled" role="navigation" aria-label="Navigation (locked)" aria-disabled="true">
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon is-active" type="button" aria-current="page" aria-label="Dashboards">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Alerts">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-sidebar-icon" type="button" aria-label="Analytics">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 3v18h18"/><path d="m7 14 4-4 3 3 5-6"/></svg>
  </button>
</nav>
Monitor Source Picker planes/source-picker
Monitor IP Type Groups Tags
zimbra-server 172.16.8.231 linux Server > Linux +3
xen71master 172.16.10.231 citrix Virtualization +1
worker1 172.16.14.94 linux Server > Linux +1
Windwsserver154 172.16.8.104 win Server > Windows +1
No monitors match your search.
2 selected
Monitor IP Type
YASH | APM Observer 172.16.15.213 linux
xen71bkp 172.16.10.232 citrix
No monitors match your search.
0 selected
openfloatingwith-triggerno-results

Floating popup for choosing a metric source while building a widget. Pairs a sticky search field with a selectable monitor table, composing two atoms — the search-input header and the table-row table base (uppercase sticky head, hairline rules, hover sweep, status dot, mono IP cells) — then layers on source-specific affordances: a per-row checkbox, group-path and tag pills, and a footer summary. Selection is multi-select via checkboxes with a tri-state select-all in the header (the row fill is derived from checkbox state with :has()), and the search filters rows live with a no-results empty state. Renders in-flow open by default or as an anchored --floating popup that a trigger field toggles; Escape and outside-click dismiss the floating variant.

used in: create-widget-modal · data-source-builder
<!-- variant: open — full source picker, in-flow + open; sticky search, selectable monitor table, 2 selected, a disabled row, footer summary -->
<div class="oo-source-picker is-open" role="dialog" aria-label="Select monitor source">
  <div class="oo-source-picker__search">
    <div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <input type="search" placeholder="Search monitors" aria-label="Search monitors" />
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-source-picker__body">
    <table class="oo-table-row oo-source-picker__table" aria-label="Monitors">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th scope="col">
            <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="mixed" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select all monitors">
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
            </button>
          </th>
          <th scope="col">Monitor</th>
          <th scope="col">IP</th>
          <th scope="col">Type</th>
          <th scope="col">Groups</th>
          <th scope="col">Tags</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <!-- state: selected -->
        <tr class="oo-source-picker__row">
          <td>
            <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="true" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select zimbra-server">
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
            </button>
          </td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__dot oo-source-picker__dot--down" aria-hidden="true"></span>zimbra-server</td>
          <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.8.231</td>
          <td class="oo-source-picker__sub oo-source-picker__sub--cap">linux</td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__group">Server &gt; Linux</span></td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__tag">+3</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr class="oo-source-picker__row">
          <td>
            <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="false" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select xen71master">
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
            </button>
          </td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__dot oo-source-picker__dot--up" aria-hidden="true"></span>xen71master</td>
          <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.10.231</td>
          <td class="oo-source-picker__sub oo-source-picker__sub--cap">citrix</td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__group">Virtualization</span></td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__tag">+1</span></td>
        </tr>
        <!-- state: selected -->
        <tr class="oo-source-picker__row">
          <td>
            <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="true" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select worker1">
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
            </button>
          </td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__dot oo-source-picker__dot--down" aria-hidden="true"></span>worker1</td>
          <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.14.94</td>
          <td class="oo-source-picker__sub oo-source-picker__sub--cap">linux</td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__group">Server &gt; Linux</span></td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__tag">+1</span></td>
        </tr>
        <!-- state: disabled — unmanaged monitor, not selectable -->
        <tr class="oo-source-picker__row is-disabled" aria-disabled="true">
          <td>
            <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="false" aria-disabled="true" disabled class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Windwsserver154 (unavailable)">
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
              <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
            </button>
          </td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>Windwsserver154</td>
          <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.8.104</td>
          <td class="oo-source-picker__sub oo-source-picker__sub--cap">win</td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__group">Server &gt; Windows</span></td>
          <td><span class="oo-source-picker__tag">+1</span></td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>

    <!-- shown via .is-empty when the search matches nothing -->
    <div class="oo-source-picker__empty" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
      <span>No monitors match your search.</span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-source-picker__foot">
    <span class="oo-source-picker__hint"><span class="oo-source-picker__count" data-oo-source-count>2</span> selected</span>
    <div class="oo-source-picker__actions">
      <button type="button" class="oo-source-picker__btn">Clear</button>
      <button type="button" class="oo-source-picker__btn oo-source-picker__btn--primary">Apply</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: with-trigger (floating) — closed popup anchored under a select field; the trigger toggles it open -->
<div class="oo-source-picker-anchor">
  <button type="button" class="oo-source-picker__trigger" aria-haspopup="dialog" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="oo-sp-demo">
    <span class="oo-source-picker__trigger-val is-placeholder">Select source</span>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m6 9 6 6 6-6"/></svg>
  </button>

  <div class="oo-source-picker oo-source-picker--floating" id="oo-sp-demo" role="dialog" aria-label="Select monitor source">
    <div class="oo-source-picker__search">
      <div class="oo-search-input oo-search-input--block">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
        <input type="search" placeholder="Search monitors" aria-label="Search monitors" />
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-source-picker__body">
      <table class="oo-table-row oo-source-picker__table" aria-label="Monitors">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th scope="col">
              <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="false" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select all monitors">
                <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
                <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
              </button>
            </th>
            <th scope="col">Monitor</th>
            <th scope="col">IP</th>
            <th scope="col">Type</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <tr class="oo-source-picker__row">
            <td>
              <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="false" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select YASH | APM Observer">
                <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
                <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
              </button>
            </td>
            <td><span class="oo-source-picker__dot oo-source-picker__dot--down" aria-hidden="true"></span>YASH | APM Observer</td>
            <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.15.213</td>
            <td class="oo-source-picker__sub oo-source-picker__sub--cap">linux</td>
          </tr>
          <tr class="oo-source-picker__row">
            <td>
              <button type="button" role="checkbox" aria-checked="false" class="oo-source-picker__check" aria-label="Select xen71bkp">
                <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-tick" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/></svg>
                <svg class="oo-source-picker__check-dash" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 12h12"/></svg>
              </button>
            </td>
            <td><span class="oo-source-picker__dot oo-source-picker__dot--up" aria-hidden="true"></span>xen71bkp</td>
            <td class="oo-table-row__num">172.16.10.232</td>
            <td class="oo-source-picker__sub oo-source-picker__sub--cap">citrix</td>
          </tr>
        </tbody>
      </table>
      <div class="oo-source-picker__empty" aria-hidden="true">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7"/><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3"/></svg>
        <span>No monitors match your search.</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-source-picker__foot">
      <span class="oo-source-picker__hint"><span class="oo-source-picker__count" data-oo-source-count>0</span> selected</span>
      <div class="oo-source-picker__actions">
        <button type="button" class="oo-source-picker__btn" disabled>Clear</button>
        <button type="button" class="oo-source-picker__btn oo-source-picker__btn--primary">Apply</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
Dashboard Subbar planes/subbar
stream
today Today
26-06-10 00:00:00
26-06-10 11:40:09
infra-health
7d Last 7 days
26-06-03 00:00:00
26-06-10 11:40:09
defaultstarredpanel-open

The full dashboard sub-toolbar under the topbar: a panel-toggle arrow, a grid glyph + dashboard name + favourite star, a flexible spacer, the active time-range pill with its date stamp, and trailing action buttons (Fullscreen, Snapshot, More). Composes the subbar-arrow, range-pill and subbar-action atoms into one assembled bar.

used in: dashboard-module
<!-- variant: default (panel collapsed, dashboard starred) -->
<div class="oo-subbar" role="toolbar" aria-label="Dashboard toolbar">
  <button class="oo-subbar__arrow" type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-label="Toggle dashboard list">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6"/></svg>
  </button>

  <div class="oo-subbar__title">
    <span class="oo-subbar__icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-subbar__name">stream</span>
    <button class="oo-subbar__star is-on" type="button" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Favourite this dashboard">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-subbar__spacer"></div>

  <div class="oo-subbar__range">
    <div class="oo-subbar__pill">
      <span class="oo-subbar__tag">today</span>
      <span class="oo-subbar__lbl">Today</span>
      <button class="oo-subbar__clr" type="button" aria-label="Clear time range">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 6l12 12M18 6 6 18"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-subbar__date">26-06-10 00:00:00<br>26-06-10 11:40:09</div>
  </div>

  <button class="oo-subbar__action" type="button" aria-label="Fullscreen">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3M16 3h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3M21 16v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-subbar__action" type="button" aria-label="Snapshot">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"/><circle cx="9" cy="11" r="2"/><path d="m3 17 5-4 4 3 3-3 6 5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-subbar__action" type="button" aria-label="More options">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="19" r="2"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- state: panel-open (chevron flipped), dashboard not starred, fullscreen active -->
<div class="oo-subbar" role="toolbar" aria-label="Dashboard toolbar">
  <button class="oo-subbar__arrow" type="button" aria-expanded="true" aria-label="Toggle dashboard list">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m15 18-6-6 6-6"/></svg>
  </button>

  <div class="oo-subbar__title">
    <span class="oo-subbar__icon" aria-hidden="true">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7" rx="1.5"/></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="oo-subbar__name">infra-health</span>
    <button class="oo-subbar__star" type="button" aria-pressed="false" aria-label="Favourite this dashboard">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m12 2 3 6.5 7 .9-5 4.8 1.3 7-6.6-3.6L6.3 21l1.3-7-5-4.8 7-.9z"/></svg>
    </button>
  </div>

  <div class="oo-subbar__spacer"></div>

  <div class="oo-subbar__range">
    <div class="oo-subbar__pill">
      <span class="oo-subbar__tag">7d</span>
      <span class="oo-subbar__lbl">Last 7 days</span>
      <button class="oo-subbar__clr" type="button" aria-label="Clear time range">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M6 6l12 12M18 6 6 18"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>
    <div class="oo-subbar__date">26-06-03 00:00:00<br>26-06-10 11:40:09</div>
  </div>

  <button class="oo-subbar__action is-active" type="button" aria-pressed="true" aria-label="Exit fullscreen">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M8 3H5a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v3M16 3h3a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v3M21 16v3a2 2 0 0 1-2 2h-3M3 16v3a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h3"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-subbar__action" type="button" aria-label="Snapshot" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="3" y="5" width="18" height="14" rx="2"/><circle cx="9" cy="11" r="2"/><path d="m3 17 5-4 4 3 3-3 6 5"/></svg>
  </button>
  <button class="oo-subbar__action" type="button" aria-label="More options">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/><circle cx="12" cy="19" r="2"/></svg>
  </button>
</div>
Toast Notification planes/toast
“CPU Utilisation” added to dashboard
Layout updated — 3 widgets rearranged
Couldn’t save widget — data source unreachable
successinfoerrorwarningtransient-host

Bottom-center transient toast for action confirmations. Refined from the live single .toast pill (one node the global toast() function rewrote and flashed via a .show class) into a reusable, semantic notification: an icon chip, a message with an optional dismiss (✕), and one local --oo-toast-accent custom property so a tone modifier (success / info / error / warning) only flips the accent + tint. A separate .oo-toast-host fixes a stack of toasts to the viewport bottom-center, or with --contained confines them to a positioned ancestor (the gallery stage). Resting toasts stay fully visible so they read statically; spawned ones run the .is-show enter animation and fade out with .is-hiding, mirroring the live 2.4s auto-dismiss. Honours prefers-reduced-motion; close button carries hover / focus-visible / disabled states.

used in: dashboard-canvas · add-widget-panel · create-widget-modal · ai-insights-drawer
<!-- variant: success (live "added to dashboard" confirmation) -->
<div class="oo-toast oo-toast--success" role="status" aria-live="polite">
  <span class="oo-toast__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <path d="M20 6 9 17l-5-5"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-toast__msg"><strong>&ldquo;CPU Utilisation&rdquo;</strong> added to dashboard</span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-toast__close" aria-label="Dismiss notification">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: info -->
<div class="oo-toast oo-toast--info" role="status" aria-live="polite">
  <span class="oo-toast__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><line x1="12" y1="11" x2="12" y2="16"/><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12.01" y2="8"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-toast__msg">Layout updated — <strong>3 widgets</strong> rearranged</span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-toast__close" aria-label="Dismiss notification">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: error (state: close disabled / persistent) -->
<div class="oo-toast oo-toast--error" role="alert" aria-live="assertive">
  <span class="oo-toast__icon" aria-hidden="true">
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
      <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9"/><line x1="15" y1="9" x2="9" y2="15"/><line x1="9" y1="9" x2="15" y2="15"/>
    </svg>
  </span>
  <span class="oo-toast__msg">Couldn&rsquo;t save widget — <strong>data source unreachable</strong></span>
  <button type="button" class="oo-toast__close" aria-label="Dismiss notification" disabled>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" aria-hidden="true">
      <line x1="18" y1="6" x2="6" y2="18"/><line x1="6" y1="6" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </svg>
  </button>
</div>

<!-- variant: transient host — click the trigger to fire a real bottom-centre toast -->
<div class="oo-toast-stage">
  <button type="button" class="oo-toast__trigger" data-oo-toast-trigger data-tone="success" data-msg="&ldquo;Memory Usage&rdquo; added to dashboard">
    Show toast
  </button>
  <div class="oo-toast-host oo-toast-host--contained" role="status" aria-live="polite"></div>
</div>
Global Topbar planes/topbar
motadata
BUILD : 8.2.5
motadata
BUILD : 8.2.5
defaultbadged-iconai-icon

Global application topbar: brand logo, flexible spacer and a right-aligned icon-button cluster (search, acknowledge, monitors, alerts, AI Copilot) plus a build pill and account avatar. Persistent chrome across every dashboard view.

used in: global-chrome · dashboard-shell · ai-copilot-launcher · alerts-tray
<!-- variant: default — full global topbar -->
<div class="oo-topbar">
  <!-- brand logo -->
  <a class="oo-topbar__logo" href="#" aria-label="motadata home">
    <span class="oo-topbar__mark" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="oo-topbar__word">mota<b>data</b></span>
  </a>

  <span class="oo-topbar__spacer"></span>

  <!-- right-aligned action cluster -->
  <div class="oo-topbar__right">
    <!-- variant: ghost icon -->
    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__ico" aria-label="Search">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="7" /><path d="m21 21-4.3-4.3" /></svg>
    </button>

    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__ico" aria-label="Acknowledge">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="9" /></svg>
    </button>

    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__ico" aria-label="Monitors">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="13" rx="2" /><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4" /></svg>
    </button>

    <!-- variant: badged icon -->
    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__ico" aria-label="Alerts, 99 plus unread">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M18 8a6 6 0 0 0-12 0c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9" /><path d="M13.7 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.4 0" /></svg>
      <span class="oo-topbar__badge" aria-hidden="true">99+</span>
    </button>

    <!-- variant: ai icon -->
    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__ico oo-topbar__ico--ai" aria-label="AI Copilot" aria-haspopup="dialog">
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 2l1.7 5.5L19 9l-5.3 1.5L12 16l-1.7-5.5L5 9l5.3-1.5z" /><path d="M18.5 13l.85 2.6 2.65.9-2.65.9-.85 2.6-.85-2.6-2.65-.9 2.65-.9z" /></svg>
    </button>

    <!-- build pill -->
    <span class="oo-topbar__build">BUILD : 8.2.5</span>

    <!-- account avatar -->
    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__avatar" aria-label="Account: Ronak Patel" aria-haspopup="menu">RP</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- state: disabled icon (no permission) -->
<div class="oo-topbar">
  <a class="oo-topbar__logo" href="#" aria-label="motadata home">
    <span class="oo-topbar__mark" aria-hidden="true"></span>
    <span class="oo-topbar__word">mota<b>data</b></span>
  </a>
  <span class="oo-topbar__spacer"></span>
  <div class="oo-topbar__right">
    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__ico" aria-label="Monitors" disabled>
      <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" aria-hidden="true"><rect x="2" y="4" width="20" height="13" rx="2" /><path d="M8 21h8M12 17v4" /></svg>
    </button>
    <span class="oo-topbar__build">BUILD : 8.2.5</span>
    <button type="button" class="oo-topbar__avatar" aria-label="Account: Ronak Patel">RP</button>
  </div>
</div>
Widget Fullscreen Modal planes/widget-fullscreen
CPU Utilisation Time Series
Widget preview area
Response Time (p95) Area
Widget preview area
defaultcontained

Fullscreen widget modal: a deep, blurred backdrop scrim centring one large card (header bar with widget title + teal type tag + ✕ close, over a big scrollable body). Used when a dashboard widget is expanded to fill the screen. Open/close is a single is-open class toggle (fade scrim + lift-in card, mirroring the live fullscreenWidget()/closeFullscreen() pair); the close control carries hover, focus-visible and disabled states; backdrop-click and Escape also dismiss. A --contained modifier confines the plane to the gallery stage, and the body is a neutral placeholder so the partial stays decoupled from any widget renderer.

used in: dashboard-module · canvas · create-widget-modal
<!-- variant: default · interactive — trigger expands the widget, ✕ / backdrop / Esc collapse it -->
<div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage">
  <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__behind" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
  </div>

  <button type="button" class="oo-widget-fullscreen__trigger" data-oo-wfs-open
          aria-haspopup="dialog">Fullscreen widget</button>

  <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen oo-widget-fullscreen--contained" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__card" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="oo-wfs-title-1">
      <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__head">
        <span class="oo-widget-fullscreen__title" id="oo-wfs-title-1">CPU Utilisation</span>
        <span class="oo-widget-fullscreen__tag">Time Series</span>
        <button type="button" class="oo-widget-fullscreen__close" data-oo-wfs-close aria-label="Exit fullscreen">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12" />
          </svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__body">
        <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__placeholder">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M3 3v18h18" />
            <path d="M7 14l4-5 3 3 4-7" />
          </svg>
          <span>Widget preview area</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- variant: contained · state: open — shown expanded with the deep scrim -->
<div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage">
  <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__behind" aria-hidden="true">
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen-stage__cell"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- state: open -->
  <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen oo-widget-fullscreen--contained is-open" role="presentation">
    <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__card" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="oo-wfs-title-2">
      <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__head">
        <span class="oo-widget-fullscreen__title" id="oo-wfs-title-2">Response Time (p95)</span>
        <span class="oo-widget-fullscreen__tag">Area</span>
        <!-- state: disabled — close locked while a render is in flight -->
        <button type="button" class="oo-widget-fullscreen__close" disabled aria-label="Exit fullscreen">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.2" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M18 6 6 18M6 6l12 12" />
          </svg>
        </button>
      </div>
      <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__body">
        <div class="oo-widget-fullscreen__placeholder">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" aria-hidden="true" focusable="false">
            <path d="M3 3v18h18" />
            <path d="M7 14l4-5 3 3 4-7" />
          </svg>
          <span>Widget preview area</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
